01431:     function normaliseLoadedState(parsed, base = defaultState()) {
01432:         const merged = {
01433:             ...base,
01434:             ...parsed,
01435:             nudge: { ...base.nudge, ...(parsed.nudge || {}) },
01436:             visibility: { ...base.visibility, ...(parsed.visibility || {}) },
01437:             quickPins: { ...base.quickPins, ...(parsed.quickPins || {}) },
01438:             coverage: { ...base.coverage, ...(parsed.coverage || {}) },
01439:             heatmap: { ...base.heatmap, ...(parsed.heatmap || {}) },
01440:             stuckDetector: { ...base.stuckDetector, ...(parsed.stuckDetector || {}) },
01441:             missionSpawn: { ...base.missionSpawn, ...(parsed.missionSpawn || {}) },
01442:             resourceGap: { ...base.resourceGap, ...(parsed.resourceGap || {}) },
01443:             transportSweep: { ...base.transportSweep, ...(parsed.transportSweep || {}) },
01444:             majorIncidentFeed: { ...base.majorIncidentFeed, ...(parsed.majorIncidentFeed || {}) },
01445:             missionAgeWatch: { ...base.missionAgeWatch, ...(parsed.missionAgeWatch || {}) },
01446:             payoutFlash: { ...base.payoutFlash, ...(parsed.payoutFlash || {}) },
01447:             discordReport: { ...base.discordReport, ...(parsed.discordReport || {}) },
01448:             financialVault: { ...base.financialVault, ...(parsed.financialVault || {}) },
01449:             autoNight: { ...base.autoNight, ...(parsed.autoNight || {}) },
01450:             profiles: Array.isArray(parsed.profiles) ? parsed.profiles.slice(0, MAP_PROFILE_LIMIT) : base.profiles,
01451:             bookmarks: Array.isArray(parsed.bookmarks) ? parsed.bookmarks.slice(0, 5) : base.bookmarks
01452:         };
01453: 
01454:         while (merged.bookmarks.length < 5) merged.bookmarks.push(null);
01455:         while (merged.profiles.length < MAP_PROFILE_LIMIT) merged.profiles.push(null);
01456: 
01457:         merged.uiTheme = normaliseUiTheme(merged.uiTheme);
01458:         merged.theme = normaliseTheme(merged.theme);
01459:         merged.position = POSITIONS[merged.position] ? merged.position : 'bl';
01460:         if (merged.activeTab === 'fleet') merged.activeTab = 'resources';
01461:         merged.activeTab = ['skins', 'tools', 'resources', 'ops', 'payouts', 'discord', 'places', 'settings'].includes(merged.activeTab) ? merged.activeTab : 'skins';
01462:         delete merged.fleetFilter;
01463:         merged.nudge.x = clamp(merged.nudge.x, -220, 220, 0);
01464:         merged.nudge.y = clamp(merged.nudge.y, -220, 220, 0);
01465:         merged.coverage.radiusMi = Number(merged.coverage.radiusMi) || 10;
01466:         merged.heatmap.radiusMi = Number(merged.heatmap.radiusMi) || 10;
01467:         merged.heatmap.opacity = clamp(merged.heatmap.opacity, 0.12, 0.55, 0.30);
01468:         merged.allianceCreditMinimum = [0, 5000, 10000, 15000, 20000].includes(Number(merged.allianceCreditMinimum)) ? Number(merged.allianceCreditMinimum) : 0;
01469:         merged.commandBarOpen = merged.commandBarOpen !== false;
01470:         merged.economyMode = Boolean(merged.economyMode);
01471:         merged.autoLoadAllVehicles = merged.autoLoadAllVehicles === true;
01472:         merged.allianceBuildingsMap = merged.allianceBuildingsMap !== false;

01499:         merged.resourceGap.radiusMi = RESOURCE_GAP_RADIUS_OPTIONS.includes(Number(merged.resourceGap.radiusMi)) ? Number(merged.resourceGap.radiusMi) : 25;
01500:         merged.transportSweep.delayMs = TRANSPORT_SWEEP_DELAY_OPTIONS.includes(Number(merged.transportSweep.delayMs)) ? Number(merged.transportSweep.delayMs) : 2000;

01511:         merged.discordReport.customStart = /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/u.test(String(merged.discordReport.customStart || '')) ? String(merged.discordReport.customStart) : localIsoDate(new Date(Date.now() - 6 * 86400000));

01529:         merged.bookmarks = merged.bookmarks.map(item => item ? {
01530:             ...item,
01531:             name: String(item.name || 'Bookmark').trim().slice(0, 80) || 'Bookmark',
01532:             shortLabel: sanitiseBookmarkShortLabel(item.shortLabel || ''),

01534:         } : null);
01535:         merged.profiles = merged.profiles.map(item => item && typeof item === 'object' ? item : null);
01536:

01541:         }
01542:

01544:         return merged;
01545:     }
01546: 
01547:     function loadState() {
01548:         const base = defaultState();
01549:         const raw = localStorage.getItem(SCRIPT.storageState) || SCRIPT.oldStorageKeys.map(key => localStorage.getItem(key)).find(Boolean);
01550:         if (!raw) return base;
01551: 
01552:         try {
01553:             return normaliseLoadedState(JSON.parse(raw), base);
01554:         } catch (err) {
01555:             return base;
01556:         }
01557:     }
01558: 
01559:     function saveState() {
01560:         try {
01561:             localStorage.setItem(SCRIPT.storageState, JSON.stringify(state));
01562:             localStorage.setItem(SCRIPT.legacyTheme, state.theme);
01563:             localStorage.setItem(SCRIPT.legacyPosition, state.position);
01564:         } catch (err) {}
01565:     }
01566: 
01567:     function getLegacyTheme() {
01568:         return normaliseTheme(localStorage.getItem(SCRIPT.legacyTheme) || 'default');
01569:     }
01570: 
01571:     function getLegacyPosition() {
01572:         const saved = localStorage.getItem(SCRIPT.legacyPosition);
01573:         return POSITIONS[saved] ? saved : 'bl';
01574:     }
01575: 
01576:     function normaliseUiTheme(key) {
01577:         return UI_THEMES[key] ? key : 'mapCommand';
01578:     }
01579: 
01580:     function applyUiTheme(key, announce = false) {
01581:         const nextTheme = normaliseUiTheme(key);
01582:         const changed = state.uiTheme !== nextTheme;
01583:         const pairedHyrulePayout = nextTheme === 'hyrule' && state.payoutFlash.template !== 'hyruleQuest';
01584:         state.uiTheme = nextTheme;
01585:         if (pairedHyrulePayout) state.payoutFlash.template = 'hyruleQuest';
01586:         saveState();
01587:         updateUI();
01588:         if (announce && changed) {
01589:             showToast(pairedHyrulePayout
01590:                 ? 'Hyrule Command interface and Quest Reward payout active'

===== LINES 16191-16315 =====
16191:     }
16192: 
16193:     function transportRequirementFromSnapshot(snapshot) {
16194:         const raw = normaliseMissingRequirementText(snapshot?.missingText);
16195:         if (!raw) return null;
16196:         const text = raw.toLowerCase();
16197:         const transportRequired = [
16198:             /\btransport(?:ation)?\b.{0,34}\b(?:needed|required|waiting|pending)\b/i,
16199:             /\b(?:needs?|requires?|awaiting)\b.{0,34}\btransport(?:ation)?\b/i,
16200:             /\bmust be transported\b/i,
16201:             /\btransport is needed\b/i,
16202:             /\b(?:transport|abtransport|gefangenentransport)\b.{0,34}\b(?:erforderlich|ben[oö]tigt|notwendig)\b/i,
16203:             /\b(?:muss|müssen)\b.{0,34}\btransportiert werden\b/i,
16204:             /\b(?:transport|vervoer)\b.{0,34}\b(?:nodig|vereist)\b/i,
16205:             /\b(?:moet|moeten)\b.{0,34}\b(?:vervoerd|afgevoerd)\b/i
16206:         ].some(pattern => pattern.test(text));
16207:         if (!transportRequired) return null;
16208: 
16209:         const prisonerTerms = /prison|prisoner|custod|detainee|arrest|cell|jail|gefangen|haft|arrestant|gevangen/i;
16210:         const patientTerms = /patient|hospital|ambulance|medical|casualt|injur|verletz|krankenhaus|ziekenhuis|gewond/i;
16211:         const patients = Number(snapshot?.patientsCount) || 0;
16212:         const prisoners = Number(snapshot?.prisonersCount) || 0;
16213:         let type = 'general';
16214:         if (prisonerTerms.test(text) || (prisoners > 0 && patients <= 0)) type = 'prisoner';
16215:         else if (patientTerms.test(text) || (patients > 0 && prisoners <= 0)) type = 'patient';
16216: 
16217:         const explicitCount = raw.match(/\b(\d{1,2})\b/);
16218:         let count = explicitCount ? Number(explicitCount[1]) : 0;
16219:         if (!count && type === 'patient' && patients > 1) count = patients;
16220:         if (!count && type === 'prisoner' && prisoners > 1) count = prisoners;
16221:         count = Math.min(99, Math.max(0, Math.round(count || 0)));
16222: 
16223:         return {
16224:             type,
16225:             count,
16226:             label: type === 'patient' ? 'Patient transport required' : type === 'prisoner' ? 'Prisoner transport required' : 'Transport required'
16227:         };
16228:     }
16229: 
16230:     function transportWatcherSvg(type) {
16231:         if (type === 'prisoner') {
16232:             return `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M3.5 8.5h12.2l3.1 3.3v5.1H3.5z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M15.7 8.5v3.3h3.1M7 11.2v3.2M10 11.2v3.2M13 11.2v3.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.55" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="7.1" cy="18" r="1.7" fill="#171008" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/><circle cx="16.4" cy="18" r="1.7" fill="#171008" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/></svg>`;
16233:         }
16234:         if (type === 'patient') {
16235:             return `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M3.5 8.5h11.8l3.7 3.5v4.9H3.5z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M15.3 8.5V12H19M8.3 10.2v4.3M6.15 12.35h4.3" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.65" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="7.1" cy="18" r="1.7" fill="#171008" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/><circle cx="16.4" cy="18" r="1.7" fill="#171008" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/></svg>`;
16236:         }
16237:         return `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M2.8 8.8h11.9l3.7 3.4v4.7H2.8z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M14.7 8.8v3.4h3.7M7.4 12.7h5.1M10.8 10.8l2 1.9-2 1.9" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.55" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="6.5" cy="18" r="1.7" fill="#171008" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/><circle cx="15.8" cy="18" r="1.7" fill="#171008" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/></svg>`;
16238:     }
16239: 
16240:     function renderedMissionFloatWidth(label, selector, fallback) {
16241:         try {
16242:             const badge = label?._icon?.querySelector?.(selector);
16243:             const width = Number(badge?.getBoundingClientRect?.().width);
16244:             if (Number.isFinite(width) && width > 0) return width;
16245:         } catch (err) {}
16246:         return fallback;
16247:     }
16248: 
16249:     function transportWatcherPlacement(map, marker, missionId, requirement) {
16250:         const personal = isPersonalMissionLayer(marker, missionId);
16251:         let occupiedWidth = 0;
16252:         let source = 'marker';
16253: 
16254:         if (personal && state.missionAge) {
16255:             occupiedWidth = renderedMissionFloatWidth(
16256:                 missionAgeLabels.get(missionId),
16257:                 '.mcms-mission-age-badge',
16258:                 52
16259:             );
16260:             source = 'mission-age';
16261:         } else if (!personal && state.allianceCredits) {
16262:             occupiedWidth = renderedMissionFloatWidth(
16263:                 allianceCreditLabels.get(missionId),
16264:                 '.mcms-alliance-credit-badge',
16265:                 64
16266:             );
16267:             source = 'alliance-credit';
16268:         } else if (state.unitCommitment) {
16269:             const commitment = personalUnitCommitmentForMission(missionId);
16270:             if (commitment.total > 0) {
16271:                 occupiedWidth = renderedMissionFloatWidth(
16272:                     unitCommitmentLabels.get(missionId),
16273:                     '.mcms-unit-commitment-badge',
16274:                     54
16275:                 );
16276:                 source = 'unit-count';
16277:             }
16278:         }
16279: 
16280:         const watcherHalfWidth = 13;
16281:         const gap = occupiedWidth > 0 ? 6 : 4;
16282:         const horizontalOffset = occupiedWidth > 0
16283:             ? Math.ceil((occupiedWidth / 2) + watcherHalfWidth + gap)
16284:             : 21;
16285: 
16286:         let side = 'right';
16287:         try {
16288:             const latLng = marker?.getLatLng?.();
16289:             const point = latLng && map?.latLngToContainerPoint?.(latLng);
16290:             const size = map?.getSize?.();
16291:             const countExtra = Number(requirement?.count) > 1 ? 10 : 3;
16292:             if (point && size && point.x + horizontalOffset + watcherHalfWidth + countExtra > size.x - 4) side = 'left';
16293:         } catch (err) {}
16294: 
16295:         return {
16296:             side,
16297:             source,
16298:             horizontalOffset,
16299:             iconAnchor: [side === 'right' ? -horizontalOffset : horizontalOffset, 18],
16300:             signature: `${side}:${source}:${horizontalOffset}`
16301:         };
16302:     }
16303: 
16304:     function makeTransportWatcherIcon(requirement, placement) {
16305:         const type = ['patient', 'prisoner'].includes(requirement?.type) ? requirement.type : 'general';
16306:         const side = placement?.side === 'left' ? 'left' : 'right';
16307:         const count = Number(requirement?.count) > 1 ? `<span class="mcms-transport-watcher-count">${escapeHtml(requirement.count)}</span>` : '';
16308:         return pageWindow.L.divIcon({
16309:             className: 'mcms-transport-watcher-icon',
16310:             html: `<span class="mcms-transport-watcher-badge mcms-transport-${type} mcms-transport-side-${side}" aria-label="${escapeHtml(requirement?.label || 'Transport required')}" title="${escapeHtml(requirement?.label || 'Transport required')}">${transportWatcherSvg(type)}${count}</span>`,
16311:             iconSize: [0, 0],
16312:             iconAnchor: placement?.iconAnchor || [-21, 18]
16313:         });
16314:     }
16315: 

===== LINES 16372-17123 =====
16372:                 activeIds.add(missionId);
16373:                 let label = transportWatcherLabels.get(missionId);
16374:                 if (!label) {
16375:                     label = pageWindow.L.marker(latLng, {
16376:                         interactive: false, keyboard: false, bubblingMouseEvents: false,
16377:                         pane, zIndexOffset: 0, icon: makeTransportWatcherIcon(requirement, placement)
16378:                     });
16379:                     label.__mcmsTransportWatcherSignature = signature;
16380:                     label.__mcmsTransportWatcherLabel = true;
16381:                     label.addTo(transportWatcherGroup);
16382:                     transportWatcherLabels.set(missionId, label);
16383:                 } else {
16384:                     try { label.setLatLng(latLng); } catch (err) {}
16385:                     if (label.__mcmsTransportWatcherSignature !== signature) {
16386:                         label.__mcmsTransportWatcherSignature = signature;
16387:                         try { label.setIcon(makeTransportWatcherIcon(requirement, placement)); } catch (err) {}
16388:                     }
16389:                 }
16390:             }
16391: 
16392:             for (const [missionId, label] of transportWatcherLabels.entries()) {
16393:                 if (activeIds.has(missionId)) continue;
16394:                 transportWatcherLabels.delete(missionId);
16395:                 try { transportWatcherGroup.removeLayer(label); } catch (err) {}
16396:             }
16397:         } catch (err) {
16398:             clearTransportWatcherLabels();
16399:         }
16400:     }
16401: 
16402:     function scheduleTransportWatcherRefresh(delay = 320) {
16403:         runtimeClearTimeout(transportWatcherTimer);
16404:         transportWatcherTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(updateTransportWatcherLabels, state.economyMode ? Math.max(900, delay) : delay);
16405:     }
16406: 
16407:     function transportSweepSleep(ms) {
16408:         return runtimeDelay(ms);
16409:     }
16410: 
16411:     function transportSweepElementVisible(element) {
16412:         if (!element || !element.isConnected) return false;
16413:         try {
16414:             const view = element.ownerDocument?.defaultView || window;
16415:             const style = view.getComputedStyle(element);
16416:             if (style.display === 'none' || style.visibility === 'hidden' || Number(style.opacity) === 0) return false;
16417:             const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();
16418:             return rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0;
16419:         } catch (err) {
16420:             return false;
16421:         }
16422:     }
16423: 
16424:     async function transportSweepWaitFor(test, timeoutMs = 5000, intervalMs = 120) {
16425:         const started = Date.now();
16426:         while (Date.now() - started < timeoutMs) {
16427:             if (runtime.destroyed || transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested) return null;
16428:             try {
16429:                 const value = test();
16430:                 if (value) return value;
16431:             } catch (err) {}
16432:             if (!await transportSweepSleep(intervalMs)) return null;
16433:         }
16434:         return null;
16435:     }
16436: 
16437:     function transportSweepLog(message, level = 'info') {
16438:         const clean = String(message || '').trim();
16439:         if (!clean) return;
16440:         transportSweepRuntime.log.unshift({ time: Date.now(), message: clean, level });
16441:         if (transportSweepRuntime.log.length > 18) transportSweepRuntime.log.length = 18;
16442:         renderTransportSweepPanel();
16443:     }
16444: 
16445:     function buildTransportSweepQueue() {
16446:         const now = Date.now();
16447:         const queue = [];
16448:         const seen = new Set();
16449:         for (const marker of getMissionMarkerIndex().markers) {
16450:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(marker?.mission_id ?? marker?.missionId ?? marker?.options?.mission_id ?? marker?.options?.missionId);
16451:             if (missionId === null || seen.has(missionId)) continue;
16452:             const personal = isPersonalMissionLayer(marker, missionId);
16453:             if (personal) continue;
16454:             const snapshot = liveMissionSnapshots.get(missionId) || missionSnapshotFromMarker(marker, now);
16455:             const requirement = transportRequirementFromSnapshot(snapshot);
16456:             const patientCount = Math.max(0, Number(snapshot?.patientsCount) || 0);
16457:             if (!requirement || requirement.type === 'prisoner') continue;
16458:             if (requirement.type !== 'patient' && patientCount <= 0) continue;
16459:             const count = Math.max(1, Math.min(99, Number(requirement.count) || patientCount || 1));
16460:             seen.add(missionId);
16461:             queue.push({
16462:                 missionId,
16463:                 caption: String(snapshot?.caption || `Alliance mission ${missionId}`),
16464:                 count,
16465:                 createdAt: Number(snapshot?.createdAt) || 0,
16466:                 requirement: requirement.label || 'Patient transport required'
16467:             });
16468:         }
16469:         queue.sort((a, b) => (a.createdAt || Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER) - (b.createdAt || Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER));
16470:         transportSweepRuntime.queue = queue;
16471:         transportSweepRuntime.scannedAt = now;
16472:         renderTransportSweepPanel();
16473:         return queue;
16474:     }
16475: 
16476:     function renderTransportSweepPanel() {
16477:         const host = document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-transport-sweep]`);
16478:         if (!host) return;
16479:         const runtime = transportSweepRuntime;
16480:         const queue = runtime.queue || [];
16481:         const currentId = normaliseMissionId(runtime.currentMissionId);
16482:         const status = runtime.running ? 'RUNNING' : runtime.stopRequested ? 'STOPPING' : queue.length ? 'READY' : 'IDLE';
16483:         const list = queue.length ? queue.map((item, index) => {
16484:             const current = currentId !== null && normaliseMissionId(item.missionId) === currentId;
16485:             return `<div class="mcms-sweep-entry ${current ? 'mcms-current' : ''}"><div><span class="mcms-sweep-title">${escapeHtml(`${index + 1}. ${item.caption}`)}</span><span class="mcms-sweep-meta">Mission ${escapeHtml(item.missionId)} · ${escapeHtml(item.requirement)}</span></div><span class="mcms-sweep-count">${escapeHtml(item.count)} req</span></div>`;
16486:         }).join('') : `<div class="mcms-empty-state">Scan to find alliance missions currently reporting patient transport requirements.</div>`;
16487:         const logs = runtime.log.length ? runtime.log.map(entry => {
16488:             const stamp = new Date(entry.time).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit' });
16489:             return `<div>${escapeHtml(stamp)} · ${escapeHtml(entry.message)}</div>`;
16490:         }).join('') : '<div>No sweep activity yet.</div>';
16491:         const html = `<div class="mcms-sweep-card"><div class="mcms-sweep-head"><span>Patient Transport Sweep</span><span class="mcms-sweep-state ${runtime.running ? 'mcms-running' : ''}">${status}</span></div><div class="mcms-sweep-stats"><div class="mcms-sweep-stat"><b>${queue.length}</b><span>Missions</span></div><div class="mcms-sweep-stat"><b>${runtime.cleared}</b><span>Cleared</span></div><div class="mcms-sweep-stat"><b>${runtime.skipped}</b><span>Skipped</span></div><div class="mcms-sweep-stat"><b>${runtime.errors}</b><span>Errors</span></div></div><div class="mcms-sweep-queue">${list}</div><div class="mcms-sweep-log">${logs}</div></div>`;
16492:         setInnerHtmlIfChanged(host, html);
16493:         const start = document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-action="start-transport-sweep"]`);
16494:         const stop = document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-action="stop-transport-sweep"]`);
16495:         const scan = document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-action="scan-transport-sweep"]`);
16496:         if (start) start.disabled = runtime.running;
16497:         if (stop) stop.disabled = !runtime.running;
16498:         if (scan) scan.disabled = runtime.running;
16499:     }
16500: 
16501:     function transportSweepVehicleIdFromHref(href) {
16502:         let pathname = String(href || '').trim();
16503:         try { pathname = new URL(pathname, document.baseURI || pageWindow.location.href).pathname; } catch (err) {}
16504:         const match = pathname.match(/^\/vehicles\/(\d+)(?:\/|$)/);
16505:         return match ? match[1] : null;
16506:     }
16507: 
16508:     function transportSweepAnchorUsable(anchor) {
16509:         if (!anchor || !anchor.isConnected || anchor.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.panelId}`)) return false;
16510:         try {
16511:             const view = anchor.ownerDocument?.defaultView || window;
16512:             let node = anchor;
16513:             for (let depth = 0; depth < 7 && node; depth += 1, node = node.parentElement) {
16514:                 const style = view.getComputedStyle(node);
16515:                 if (style.display === 'none' || style.visibility === 'hidden') continue;
16516:                 const rect = node.getBoundingClientRect();
16517:                 if (rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0) return true;
16518:             }
16519:         } catch (err) {}
16520:         return false;
16521:     }
16522: 
16523:     function transportSweepDocumentContexts() {
16524:         const contexts = [];
16525:         const seenDocuments = new Set();
16526:         const visit = (doc, label = 'top') => {
16527:             if (!doc || seenDocuments.has(doc)) return;
16528:             seenDocuments.add(doc);
16529:             contexts.push({ doc, label });
16530:             let frames = [];
16531:             try { frames = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('iframe, frame')); } catch (err) {}
16532:             frames.forEach((frame, index) => {
16533:                 try {
16534:                     const child = frame.contentDocument || frame.contentWindow?.document;
16535:                     if (child) visit(child, `${label}/frame${index + 1}`);
16536:                 } catch (err) {
16537:                     // Cross-origin frames are intentionally ignored.
16538:                 }
16539:             });
16540:         };
16541:         visit(document);
16542:         return contexts;
16543:     }
16544: 
16545:     function transportSweepVehicleAnchorsWithin(root = null, requireUsable = true) {
16546:         const scope = root && (root.isConnected || root.nodeType === 9) ? root : document;
16547:         let anchors = [];
16548:         try { anchors = Array.from(scope.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/vehicles/"]')); } catch (err) {}
16549:         return anchors.filter(anchor => {
16550:             if (!transportSweepVehicleIdFromHref(anchor.getAttribute('href'))) return false;
16551:             return !requireUsable || transportSweepAnchorUsable(anchor);
16552:         });
16553:     }
16554: 
16555:     function transportSweepVisibleVehicleAnchors() {
16556:         const anchors = [];
16557:         const seen = new Set();
16558:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
16559:             for (const anchor of transportSweepVehicleAnchorsWithin(context.doc, true)) {
16560:                 if (seen.has(anchor)) continue;
16561:                 seen.add(anchor);
16562:                 anchors.push(anchor);
16563:             }
16564:         }
16565:         return anchors;
16566:     }
16567: 
16568:     function transportSweepVisibleWindowRoots() {
16569:         const selectors = [
16570:             '#lightbox_box .lightbox_content', '#lightbox_box', '#lightbox', '.lightbox_content',
16571:             '[id*="lightbox"]', '.lightbox', '.modal.show .modal-content', '.modal.in .modal-content',
16572:             '.modal.show', '.modal.in', '[role="dialog"]', '.ui-dialog-content', '.ui-dialog'
16573:         ];
16574:         const roots = [];
16575:         const seen = new Set();
16576:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
16577:             for (const selector of selectors) {
16578:                 let matches = [];
16579:                 try { matches = Array.from(context.doc.querySelectorAll(selector)); } catch (err) {}
16580:                 for (const root of matches) {
16581:                     if (!root || seen.has(root) || !transportSweepElementVisible(root)) continue;
16582:                     if (root.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.panelId}`)) continue;
16583:                     seen.add(root);
16584:                     roots.push(root);
16585:                 }
16586:             }
16587:             if (context.doc !== document) {
16588:                 const body = context.doc.body;
16589:                 if (body && !seen.has(body) && transportSweepElementVisible(body) && transportSweepVehicleAnchorsWithin(body, true).length) {
16590:                     seen.add(body);
16591:                     roots.push(body);
16592:                 }
16593:             }
16594:         }
16595:         return roots;
16596:     }
16597: 
16598:     function transportSweepRootScore(root, missionId = null) {
16599:         if (!root || !root.isConnected) return -1;
16600:         const anchors = transportSweepVehicleAnchorsWithin(root);
16601:         if (!anchors.length) return -1;
16602:         let score = anchors.length * 10;
16603:         const text = String(root.textContent || '').toLowerCase();
16604:         if (/mission|incident|einsatz|call/.test(text)) score += 15;
16605:         if (/patient|transport|ambulance|discharge/.test(text)) score += 30;
16606:         if (missionId !== null) {
16607:             try {
16608:                 if (root.querySelector(`a[href*="/missions/${missionId}"]`)) score += 80;
16609:             } catch (err) {}
16610:         }
16611:         const rect = root.getBoundingClientRect();
16612:         score += Math.min(30, Math.round((rect.width * rect.height) / 50000));
16613:         return score;
16614:     }
16615: 
16616:     function transportSweepFindMissionWindowRoot(missionId = null) {
16617:         const roots = transportSweepVisibleWindowRoots();
16618:         let best = null;
16619:         let bestScore = -1;
16620:         for (const root of roots) {
16621:             const score = transportSweepRootScore(root, missionId);
16622:             if (score > bestScore) {
16623:                 best = root;
16624:                 bestScore = score;
16625:             }
16626:         }
16627:         if (best) return best;
16628: 
16629:         // Fallback for MissionChief builds that render lightbox content without a stable wrapper.
16630:         const baseline = transportSweepRuntime.missionAnchorBaseline;
16631:         const anchor = transportSweepVisibleVehicleAnchors().find(item => !(baseline instanceof Set) || !baseline.has(item));
16632:         if (!anchor) return null;
16633:         return anchor.closest?.('#lightbox_box, #lightbox, .lightbox_content, .modal-content, [role="dialog"], .ui-dialog-content') || anchor.ownerDocument?.body || anchor.parentElement;
16634:     }
16635: 
16636:     function transportSweepAnchorBelongsToMissionWindow(anchor) {
16637:         if (!anchor || !transportSweepAnchorUsable(anchor)) return false;
16638:         const root = transportSweepRuntime.missionWindowRoot;
16639:         if (root?.isConnected && root.contains(anchor)) return true;
16640:         const baseline = transportSweepRuntime.missionAnchorBaseline;
16641:         if (baseline instanceof Set && !baseline.has(anchor)) return true;
16642:         return transportSweepVisibleWindowRoots().some(windowRoot => windowRoot.contains(anchor));
16643:     }
16644: 
16645:     function transportSweepOwnVehicleIdSet() {
16646:         if (transportSweepRuntime.ownVehicleIds instanceof Set && transportSweepRuntime.ownVehicleIds.size) {
16647:             return new Set(Array.from(transportSweepRuntime.ownVehicleIds, id => String(id)));
16648:         }
16649:         const ids = new Set(Array.from(personalVehicleApiCache.keys(), id => String(id)));
16650:         for (const vehicle of getPersonalVehicleRecords()) {
16651:             const id = vehicleRecordId(vehicle);
16652:             if (id !== null) ids.add(String(id));
16653:         }
16654:         transportSweepRuntime.ownVehicleIds = ids;
16655:         return ids;
16656:     }
16657: 
16658:     function collectTransportSweepStaticCandidates(anchors, source = 'mission HTML', preserveAnchors = false) {
16659:         const unique = new Map();
16660:         const ownIds = transportSweepOwnVehicleIdSet();
16661:         let rejectedOwn = 0;
16662:         let allianceLinks = 0;
16663:         let rejectedNotFms5 = 0;
16664:         let rejectedNotPatient = 0;
16665: 
16666:         for (const anchor of Array.from(anchors || [])) {
16667:             const href = String(anchor.getAttribute?.('href') || '').trim();
16668:             const vehicleId = transportSweepVehicleIdFromHref(href);
16669:             if (!vehicleId) continue;
16670: 
16671:             const row = anchor.closest?.('tr[id^="vehicle_row_"], tr, li, [id^="vehicle_row_"], [class*="vehicle_row"]');
16672:             const fms5 = row?.querySelector?.('.building_list_fms_5');
16673:             if (!row || !fms5) {
16674:                 rejectedNotFms5 += 1;
16675:                 continue;
16676:             }
16677: 
16678:             if (ownIds.has(String(vehicleId))) {
16679:                 rejectedOwn += 1;
16680:                 continue;
16681:             }
16682: 
16683:             allianceLinks += 1;
16684:             const vehicleTypeId = String(anchor.getAttribute?.('vehicle_type_id') || '');
16685:             const label = String(anchor.textContent || 'Alliance vehicle').trim() || 'Alliance vehicle';
16686:             const rowText = String(row.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
16687:             const isPatientVehicle = vehicleTypeId === '5' || /ambulance|patient|paramedic|rettungs|krankentransport|rtw\b/i.test(`${label} ${rowText}`);
16688:             if (!isPatientVehicle) {
16689:                 rejectedNotPatient += 1;
16690:                 continue;
16691:             }
16692: 
16693:             const normalisedHref = `/vehicles/${vehicleId}`;
16694:             const candidate = {
16695:                 href: normalisedHref,
16696:                 vehicleId,
16697:                 label,
16698:                 vehicleTypeId,
16699:                 score: 500,
16700:                 anchor: preserveAnchors ? anchor : null,
16701:                 row: preserveAnchors ? row : null,
16702:                 source,
16703:                 rowText
16704:             };
16705:             if (!unique.has(normalisedHref)) unique.set(normalisedHref, candidate);
16706:         }
16707: 
16708:         return {
16709:             candidates: Array.from(unique.values())
16710:                 .sort((a, b) => a.label.localeCompare(b.label) || Number(a.vehicleId) - Number(b.vehicleId))
16711:                 .slice(0, TRANSPORT_SWEEP_MAX_CANDIDATES_PER_MISSION),
16712:             stats: {
16713:                 totalLinks: Array.from(anchors || []).length,
16714:                 allianceLinks,
16715:                 rejectedOwn,
16716:                 rejectedNotFms5,
16717:                 rejectedNotPatient,
16718:                 candidates: unique.size,
16719:                 source
16720:             }
16721:         };
16722:     }
16723: 
16724:     async function transportSweepFetchMissionCandidates(missionId) {
16725:         const id = normaliseMissionId(missionId);
16726:         if (id === null || transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested) return null;
16727:         const requestModes = [
16728:             { headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest', Accept: 'text/html, */*;q=0.8' } },
16729:             { headers: { Accept: 'text/html,application/xhtml+xml' } }
16730:         ];
16731:         let bestResult = null;
16732:         for (const mode of requestModes) {
16733:             if (transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested) return null;
16734:             try {
16735:                 const response = await runtimeFetch(`/missions/${id}`, {
16736:                     method: 'GET',
16737:                     credentials: 'same-origin',
16738:                     cache: 'no-store',
16739:                     headers: mode.headers
16740:                 });
16741:                 if (!response.ok) continue;
16742:                 const html = await response.text();
16743:                 if (!html || html.length < 100) continue;
16744:                 const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(html, 'text/html');
16745:                 const anchors = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/vehicles/"]'))
16746:                     .filter(anchor => transportSweepVehicleIdFromHref(anchor.getAttribute('href')));
16747:                 if (!anchors.length) continue;
16748:                 const result = { ...collectTransportSweepStaticCandidates(anchors, 'mission HTML'), htmlLength: html.length };
16749:                 if (!bestResult || result.stats.totalLinks > bestResult.stats.totalLinks) bestResult = result;
16750:                 if (result.candidates.length) return result;
16751:             } catch (err) {
16752:                 // Try the next request mode.
16753:             }
16754:         }
16755:         return bestResult;
16756:     }
16757: 
16758:     async function collectTransportSweepVehicleCandidatesForMission(missionId) {
16759:         const domCandidates = collectTransportSweepVehicleCandidates();
16760:         const domStats = { ...(transportSweepRuntime.lastCandidateStats || {}) };
16761:         if (domCandidates.length) return domCandidates;
16762: 
16763:         const fetched = await transportSweepFetchMissionCandidates(missionId);
16764:         if (fetched) {
16765:             transportSweepRuntime.rejectedOwn = fetched.stats.rejectedOwn || 0;
16766:             transportSweepRuntime.lastCandidateStats = fetched.stats;
16767:             if (fetched.candidates?.length) {
16768:                 transportSweepLog(`Recovered ${fetched.stats.totalLinks} vehicle links from mission HTML`);
16769:                 return fetched.candidates;
16770:             }
16771:         }
16772: 
16773:         if (!fetched) transportSweepRuntime.lastCandidateStats = domStats;
16774:         return [];
16775:     }
16776: 
16777:     function collectTransportSweepVehicleCandidates() {
16778:         const root = transportSweepRuntime.missionWindowRoot?.isConnected ? transportSweepRuntime.missionWindowRoot : null;
16779:         let anchors = root ? transportSweepVehicleAnchorsWithin(root) : [];
16780:         if (!anchors.length) anchors = transportSweepVisibleVehicleAnchors().filter(anchor => transportSweepAnchorBelongsToMissionWindow(anchor));
16781: 
16782:         const result = collectTransportSweepStaticCandidates(anchors, 'mission window', true);
16783:         transportSweepRuntime.rejectedOwn = result.stats.rejectedOwn || 0;
16784:         transportSweepRuntime.lastCandidateStats = result.stats;
16785:         return result.candidates;
16786:     }
16787: 
16788:     function transportSweepVisibleDischargeButtons() {
16789:         const buttons = [];
16790:         const seen = new Set();
16791:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
16792:             let matches = [];
16793:             try { matches = Array.from(context.doc.querySelectorAll('button')); } catch (err) {}
16794:             for (const button of matches) {
16795:                 if (seen.has(button) || !transportSweepElementVisible(button) || button.disabled) continue;
16796:                 if (String(button.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase() !== 'discharge patient') continue;
16797:                 seen.add(button);
16798:                 buttons.push(button);
16799:             }
16800:         }
16801:         return buttons;
16802:     }
16803: 
16804:     function findVisibleDischargePatientButton(excludedButtons = null) {
16805:         const excluded = excludedButtons instanceof Set ? excludedButtons : null;
16806:         return transportSweepVisibleDischargeButtons().find(button => !excluded || !excluded.has(button)) || null;
16807:     }
16808: 
16809:     async function openTransportSweepPath(path, mode) {
16810:         if (transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested) return false;
16811:         if (typeof pageWindow.lightboxOpen !== 'function') throw new Error('MissionChief lightboxOpen is unavailable');
16812: 
16813:         if (mode === 'mission') {
16814:             transportSweepRuntime.missionAnchorBaseline = new Set(transportSweepVisibleVehicleAnchors());
16815:             transportSweepRuntime.rejectedOwn = 0;
16816:             transportSweepRuntime.missionWindowRoot = null;
16817:             const beforeWindowText = transportSweepVisibleWindowRoots().map(root => String(root.textContent || '').trim()).join('|');
16818:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(String(path || '').match(/\/missions\/(\d+)/)?.[1]);
16819:             pageWindow.lightboxOpen(path);
16820:             await transportSweepWaitFor(() => {
16821:                 const root = transportSweepFindMissionWindowRoot(missionId);
16822:                 if (root) {
16823:                     const anchors = transportSweepVehicleAnchorsWithin(root);
16824:                     const afterText = String(root.textContent || '').trim();
16825:                     const changed = afterText && !beforeWindowText.includes(afterText);
16826:                     if (anchors.length || changed) {
16827:                         transportSweepRuntime.missionWindowRoot = root;
16828:                         return { root, anchors };
16829:                     }
16830:                 }
16831:                 const newAnchor = transportSweepVisibleVehicleAnchors().find(anchor => !transportSweepRuntime.missionAnchorBaseline.has(anchor));
16832:                 if (newAnchor) {
16833:                     transportSweepRuntime.missionWindowRoot = newAnchor.closest?.('#lightbox_box, #lightbox, .lightbox_content, .modal-content, [role="dialog"], .ui-dialog-content') || newAnchor.ownerDocument?.body || newAnchor.parentElement;
16834:                     return { root: transportSweepRuntime.missionWindowRoot, anchors: [newAnchor] };
16835:                 }
16836:                 return null;
16837:             }, 3200, 120);
16838:             return !transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested;
16839:         }
16840: 
16841:         pageWindow.lightboxOpen(path);
16842:         await transportSweepSleep(900);
16843:         return !transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested;
16844:     }
16845: 
16846:     async function openTransportSweepVehicle(candidate) {
16847:         if (transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested || !candidate?.href) return null;
16848:         transportSweepRuntime.vehicleButtonBaseline = new Set(transportSweepVisibleDischargeButtons());
16849:         const beforeRoots = transportSweepVisibleWindowRoots();
16850:         const beforeText = beforeRoots.map(root => String(root.textContent || '').trim()).join('|');
16851: 
16852:         let anchor = candidate.anchor;
16853:         if (!anchor?.isConnected) {
16854:             const root = transportSweepRuntime.missionWindowRoot?.isConnected ? transportSweepRuntime.missionWindowRoot : document;
16855:             anchor = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll?.('a[href*="/vehicles/"]') || []).find(item => transportSweepVehicleIdFromHref(item.getAttribute('href')) === String(candidate.vehicleId));
16856:         }
16857: 
16858:         let usedMissionClick = false;
16859:         if (anchor?.isConnected) {
16860:             try {
16861:                 anchor.scrollIntoView?.({ block: 'nearest', inline: 'nearest' });
16862:                 anchor.click();
16863:                 usedMissionClick = true;
16864:             } catch (err) {}
16865:         }
16866: 
16867:         if (!usedMissionClick) {
16868:             if (typeof pageWindow.lightboxOpen !== 'function') return null;
16869:             pageWindow.lightboxOpen(candidate.href);
16870:         }
16871: 
16872:         const openedAt = Date.now();
16873:         return await transportSweepWaitFor(() => {
16874:             const button = findVisibleDischargePatientButton(transportSweepRuntime.vehicleButtonBaseline);
16875:             if (button) return { opened: true, button };
16876:             const afterText = transportSweepVisibleWindowRoots().map(root => String(root.textContent || '').trim()).join('|');
16877:             if (afterText && afterText !== beforeText && Date.now() - openedAt > 350) return { opened: true, button: null };
16878:             return null;
16879:         }, 7500, 140);
16880:     }
16881: 
16882:     async function processTransportSweepMission(item, remainingAllowance) {
16883:         const missionId = normaliseMissionId(item?.missionId);
16884:         if (missionId === null || remainingAllowance <= 0) return 0;
16885: 
16886:         transportSweepRuntime.currentMissionId = missionId;
16887:         renderTransportSweepPanel();
16888: 
16889:         const target = Math.max(1, Math.min(Number(item.count) || 1, remainingAllowance));
16890:         const attemptedVehicleIds = new Set();
16891:         let clearedHere = 0;
16892:         let initialScanLogged = false;
16893:         let missionHadCandidates = false;
16894: 
16895:         while (!transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested && clearedHere < target && transportSweepRuntime.cleared < state.transportSweep.maxPerRun) {
16896:             transportSweepLog(`${attemptedVehicleIds.size ? 'Reopening' : 'Opening'} ${item.caption}`);
16897:             const opened = await openTransportSweepPath(`/missions/${missionId}`, 'mission');
16898:             if (!opened || transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested) break;
16899: 
16900:             const candidates = await collectTransportSweepVehicleCandidatesForMission(missionId);
16901:             const candidateStats = transportSweepRuntime.lastCandidateStats || {};
16902:             if (!initialScanLogged) {
16903:                 const source = candidateStats.source ? ` · ${candidateStats.source}` : '';
16904:                 transportSweepLog(`Mission scan: ${candidateStats.totalLinks || 0} vehicle links · ${candidateStats.allianceLinks || 0} alliance FMS 5 · ${candidateStats.candidates || 0} patient candidates${source}`);
16905:                 if (transportSweepRuntime.rejectedOwn > 0) {
16906:                     transportSweepLog(`Ignored ${transportSweepRuntime.rejectedOwn} of your own FMS 5 vehicle${transportSweepRuntime.rejectedOwn === 1 ? '' : 's'} at ${item.caption}`);
16907:                 }
16908:                 initialScanLogged = true;
16909:             }
16910: 
16911:             if (candidates.length) missionHadCandidates = true;
16912:             const candidate = candidates.find(entry => !attemptedVehicleIds.has(String(entry.vehicleId)));
16913:             if (!candidate) {
16914:                 if (!missionHadCandidates) {
16915:                     transportSweepLog(`No non-personal FMS 5 patient vehicles were found inside ${item.caption}`, 'warn');
16916:                 } else {
16917:                     transportSweepLog(`Checked every non-personal FMS 5 patient vehicle at ${item.caption}; none exposed Discharge patient`, 'warn');
16918:                 }
16919:                 break;
16920:             }
16921: 
16922:             attemptedVehicleIds.add(String(candidate.vehicleId));
16923:             transportSweepRuntime.currentVehicleHref = candidate.href;
16924:             renderTransportSweepPanel();
16925:             transportSweepLog(`Checking FMS 5 ${candidate.label} (${candidate.vehicleId}) · ${attemptedVehicleIds.size}/${candidates.length}`);
16926: 
16927:             const vehicleResult = await openTransportSweepVehicle(candidate);
16928:             if (transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested) break;
16929: 
16930:             const button = vehicleResult?.button || (vehicleResult?.opened ? await transportSweepWaitFor(
16931:                 () => findVisibleDischargePatientButton(transportSweepRuntime.vehicleButtonBaseline),
16932:                 3200,
16933:                 120
16934:             ) : null);
16935: 
16936:             if (!button) {
16937:                 transportSweepLog(`${candidate.label} is carrying a patient but is not transport-ready; continuing in the same mission`);
16938:                 await transportSweepSleep(350);
16939:                 continue;
16940:             }
16941: 
16942:             try {
16943:                 button.click();
16944:                 const cleared = await transportSweepWaitFor(() => {
16945:                     if (!button.isConnected || !transportSweepElementVisible(button) || button.disabled) return true;
16946:                     return String(button.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase() !== 'discharge patient' ? true : null;
16947:                 }, 5000, 140);
16948:                 if (!cleared) throw new Error('Discharge confirmation timed out');
16949: 
16950:                 clearedHere += 1;
16951:                 transportSweepRuntime.cleared += 1;
16952:                 transportSweepRuntime.processed += 1;
16953:                 transportSweepLog(`Cleared ${candidate.label} at ${item.caption}`);
16954:             } catch (err) {
16955:                 transportSweepRuntime.errors += 1;
16956:                 transportSweepLog(`Failed ${candidate.label}: ${err?.message || 'unknown error'}`, 'error');
16957:             }
16958: 
16959:             if (!transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested && clearedHere < target && transportSweepRuntime.cleared < state.transportSweep.maxPerRun) {
16960:                 await transportSweepSleep(state.transportSweep.delayMs);
16961:             }
16962:         }
16963: 
16964:         if (clearedHere === 0 && !transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested) {
16965:             transportSweepRuntime.skipped += 1;
16966:         }
16967:         return clearedHere;
16968:     }
16969: 
16970:     async function startTransportSweep() {
16971:         if (transportSweepRuntime.running) return;
16972:         const queue = buildTransportSweepQueue();
16973:         if (!queue.length) {
16974:             showToast('No alliance patient transports found');
16975:             return;
16976:         }
16977:         showToast('Verifying your personal vehicle list…');
16978:         const ownershipReady = await refreshPersonalVehicleData(true);
16979:         if (!ownershipReady || !vehicleApiReady || personalVehicleApiCache.size === 0) {
16980:             showToast('Transport Sweep cancelled — your vehicle ownership list could not be verified');
16981:             return;
16982:         }
16983:         transportSweepRuntime.ownVehicleIds = new Set(Array.from(personalVehicleApiCache.keys(), id => String(id)));
16984:         const totalRequests = queue.reduce((sum, item) => sum + Math.max(1, Number(item.count) || 1), 0);
16985:         const planned = Math.min(totalRequests, state.transportSweep.maxPerRun);
16986:         const confirmed = pageWindow.confirm(`Transport Sweep will use MissionChief's visible co-admin controls to attempt up to ${planned} patient discharges across ${queue.length} alliance mission${queue.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}.\n\nYour own vehicle IDs are excluded before any vehicle window is opened. The sweep will inspect each non-personal FMS 5 patient vehicle until MissionChief exposes the enabled “Discharge patient” button. Continue?`);
16987:         if (!confirmed) return;
16988:         transportSweepRuntime.running = true;
16989:         transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested = false;
16990:         transportSweepRuntime.currentMissionId = null;
16991:         transportSweepRuntime.currentVehicleHref = '';
16992:         transportSweepRuntime.cleared = 0;
16993:         transportSweepRuntime.skipped = 0;
16994:         transportSweepRuntime.errors = 0;
16995:         transportSweepRuntime.processed = 0;
16996:         transportSweepRuntime.rejectedOwn = 0;
16997:         transportSweepRuntime.missionAnchorBaseline = new Set();
16998:         transportSweepRuntime.vehicleButtonBaseline = new Set();
16999:         transportSweepRuntime.missionWindowRoot = null;
17000:         transportSweepRuntime.lastCandidateStats = null;
17001:         transportSweepRuntime.log = [];
17002:         renderTransportSweepPanel();
17003:         transportSweepLog(`Sweep started: ${queue.length} missions, maximum ${state.transportSweep.maxPerRun} requests`);
17004:         try {
17005:             for (const item of queue) {
17006:                 if (transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested || transportSweepRuntime.cleared >= state.transportSweep.maxPerRun) break;
17007:                 const remaining = state.transportSweep.maxPerRun - transportSweepRuntime.cleared;
17008:                 await processTransportSweepMission(item, remaining);
17009:                 if (!transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested) await transportSweepSleep(state.transportSweep.delayMs);
17010:             }
17011:         } catch (err) {
17012:             transportSweepRuntime.errors += 1;
17013:             transportSweepLog(`Sweep stopped by error: ${err?.message || 'unknown error'}`, 'error');
17014:         } finally {
17015:             const wasStopped = transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested;
17016:             transportSweepRuntime.running = false;
17017:             transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested = false;
17018:             transportSweepRuntime.currentMissionId = null;
17019:             transportSweepRuntime.currentVehicleHref = '';
17020:             transportSweepRuntime.missionAnchorBaseline = new Set();
17021:             transportSweepRuntime.vehicleButtonBaseline = new Set();
17022:             buildTransportSweepQueue();
17023:             renderTransportSweepPanel();
17024:             scheduleTransportWatcherRefresh(0);
17025:             showToast(wasStopped ? `Transport Sweep stopped · ${transportSweepRuntime.cleared} cleared` : `Transport Sweep complete · ${transportSweepRuntime.cleared} cleared`);
17026:             transportSweepLog(`${wasStopped ? 'Stopped' : 'Complete'}: ${transportSweepRuntime.cleared} cleared, ${transportSweepRuntime.skipped} skipped, ${transportSweepRuntime.errors} errors`);
17027:         }
17028:     }
17029: 
17030:     function stopTransportSweep() {
17031:         if (!transportSweepRuntime.running) return;
17032:         transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested = true;
17033:         transportSweepLog('Stop requested — finishing the current action');
17034:         renderTransportSweepPanel();
17035:     }
17036: 
17037:     function vehicleTargetInfo(vehicle) {
17038:         if (!vehicle || typeof vehicle !== 'object') return { type: null, id: null };
17039:         const containers = [vehicle, vehicle.options, vehicle.params, vehicle.vehicle, vehicle.data, vehicle.vehicleData, vehicle._vehicleData]
17040:             .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
17041:         for (const item of containers) {
17042:             const type = String(item.target_type ?? item.targetType ?? '').toLowerCase();
17043:             const id = normaliseMissionId(item.target_id ?? item.targetId);
17044:             if ((type === 'mission' || type === 'building') && id !== null && id !== '0') return { type, id };
17045:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(item.mission_id ?? item.missionId);
17046:             if (missionId !== null && missionId !== '0') return { type: 'mission', id: missionId };
17047:             const buildingId = normaliseMissionId(item.target_building_id ?? item.targetBuildingId);
17048:             if (buildingId !== null && buildingId !== '0') return { type: 'building', id: buildingId };
17049:         }
17050:         return { type: null, id: null };
17051:     }
17052: 
17053:     function vehicleSearchSignal(vehicle) {
17054:         if (!vehicle || typeof vehicle !== 'object') return '';
17055:         const containers = [vehicle, vehicle.options, vehicle.params, vehicle.vehicle, vehicle.data, vehicle.vehicleData, vehicle._vehicleData]
17056:             .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
17057:         const values = [];
17058:         for (const item of containers) {
17059:             values.push(item.caption, item.name, item.vehicle_type_caption, item.vehicleTypeCaption, item.vehicle_type_name, item.vehicleTypeName, item.type_caption, item.typeCaption, item.title);
17060:         }
17061:         try { values.push(vehicle?._icon?.title, vehicle?._icon?.alt, vehicle?._icon?.getAttribute?.('aria-label')); } catch (err) {}
17062:         return values.filter(Boolean).join(' ');
17063:     }
17064: 
17065:     function vehicleStatusBucket(vehicle) {
17066:         const status = vehicleStatusCode(vehicle);
17067:         if ([1, 2].includes(status)) return 'available';
17068:         if (status === 3) return 'travelling';
17069:         if (status === 4) return 'scene';
17070:         if ([7, 8].includes(status)) return 'transport';
17071:         return 'other';
17072:     }
17073: 
17074:     function clearResourceGapLabels() {
17075:         if (resourceGapGroup) {
17076:             try { resourceGapGroup.clearLayers(); resourceGapGroup.remove(); } catch (err) {}
17077:         }
17078:         resourceGapLabels.clear();
17079:         resourceGapGroup = null;
17080:     }
17081: 
17082:     function splitRequirementItems(value) {
17083:         return String(value || '').split(/\s*(?:•|;|\n|,(?=\s*\d+\s*(?:x|×)?\b))\s*/).map(item => item.trim()).filter(Boolean);
17084:     }
17085: 
17086:     function parseCountedRequirement(value) {
17087:         const clean = String(value || '').replace(/^[-–—\s]+/, '').trim();
17088:         const match = clean.match(/^(\d+)\s*(?:x|×)?\s+(.+)$/i);
17089:         if (match) return { count: Math.max(1, Number(match[1]) || 1), name: match[2].replace(/[.!]+$/, '').trim() };
17090:         if (clean) return { count: 1, name: clean.replace(/[.!]+$/, '').trim() };
17091:         return null;
17092:     }
17093: 
17094:     function resourceRequirementsFromSnapshot(snapshot) {
17095:         const raw = normaliseMissingRequirementText(snapshot?.missingText);
17096:         const result = { raw, vehicles: [], personnel: [], other: [] };
17097:         if (!raw) return result;
17098:         const labelled = /\b(?:vehicles?|personnel|other)\s*:/i.test(raw);
17099:         if (labelled) {
17100:             const sectionPattern = /\b(vehicles?|personnel|other)\s*:\s*([\s\S]*?)(?=\s*•?\s*\b(?:vehicles?|personnel|other)\s*:|$)/gi;
17101:             let section;
17102:             while ((section = sectionPattern.exec(raw))) {
17103:                 const key = /^vehicle/i.test(section[1]) ? 'vehicles' : /^personnel/i.test(section[1]) ? 'personnel' : 'other';
17104:                 for (const item of splitRequirementItems(section[2])) {
17105:                     const parsed = parseCountedRequirement(item);
17106:                     if (parsed && parsed.name) result[key].push(parsed);
17107:                 }
17108:             }
17109:         } else {
17110:             const transportOnly = transportRequirementFromSnapshot(snapshot);
17111:             if (!transportOnly && /\b(?:vehicle|engine|unit|carrier|ladder|ambulance|police|car|van|boat|helicopter|support|officer)\b/i.test(raw)) {
17112:                 for (const item of splitRequirementItems(raw)) {
17113:                     const parsed = parseCountedRequirement(item.replace(/^missing\s*:?\s*/i, ''));
17114:                     if (parsed && parsed.name) result.vehicles.push(parsed);
17115:                 }
17116:             }
17117:         }
17118:         result.vehicles = result.vehicles.filter(item => item.name && !/transport is needed|required transport/i.test(item.name));
17119:         return result;
17120:     }
17121: 
17122:     function normaliseSearchText(value) {
17123:         return String(value || '').toLowerCase().normalize('NFKD').replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, ' ').trim();

===== LINES 17777-17901 =====
17777:     function scheduleMarkerStateSync(delay = 20, trailing = false) {
17778:         const timerName = trailing ? 'markerStateTrailingTimer' : 'markerStateSyncTimer';
17779:         const currentTimer = trailing ? markerStateTrailingTimer : markerStateSyncTimer;
17780:         runtimeClearTimeout(currentTimer);
17781:         const callback = () => {
17782:             if (trailing) markerStateTrailingTimer = null;
17783:             else markerStateSyncTimer = null;
17784:             if (runtime.destroyed || document.hidden) return;
17785:             if (!state.visibility.vehicles || state.markerFocus) synchroniseVehicleMarkerClasses();
17786:             if (!state.visibility.buildings) synchronisePersonalBuildingVisibility();
17787:         };
17788:         const id = runtimeSetTimeout(callback, Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
17789:         if (timerName === 'markerStateTrailingTimer') markerStateTrailingTimer = id;
17790:         else markerStateSyncTimer = id;
17791:     }
17792: 
17793:     function scheduleMarkerClassification() {
17794:         runtimeClearTimeout(classifyTimer);
17795:         classifyTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(classifyMarkersNow, state.economyMode ? 420 : 180);
17796:     }
17797: 
17798:     function markerClassificationNeeded() {
17799:         return Boolean(
17800:             state.markerFocus || state.missionPulse || criticalViewActive ||
17801:             !state.visibility.vehicles || !state.visibility.buildings ||
17802:             !state.visibility.myMissions || !state.visibility.allianceMissions
17803:         );
17804:     }
17805: 
17806:     function vehicleDataNeeded() {
17807:         return Boolean(
17808:             state.unitCommitment || state.allianceCredits || state.resourceGap.enabled ||
17809:             state.missionInspector || state.stuckDetector.enabled || criticalViewActive ||
17810:             document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId)?.classList?.contains('mcms-open') ||
17811:             document.getElementById(SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId)?.classList?.contains('mcms-open') ||
17812:             transportSweepRuntime.running
17813:         );
17814:     }
17815: 
17816:     function missionSnapshotsNeeded() {
17817:         return Boolean(
17818:             state.payoutFlash.enabled || state.transportWatcher || state.stuckDetector.enabled ||
17819:             state.missionSpawn.enabled || state.allianceCredits || state.missionAge ||
17820:             state.unitCommitment || state.resourceGap.enabled || state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled || criticalViewActive ||
17821:             operationalUiIsVisible() || missionInspectorMarker
17822:         );
17823:     }
17824: 
17825:     function isToolkitLeafletLayer(layer) {
17826:         return Boolean(layer && (
17827:             layer.__mcmsHeatmapCell || layer.__mcmsHeatmapLayer ||
17828:             layer.__mcmsCoverageRing || layer.__mcmsCoverageLayer ||
17829:             layer.__mcmsAllianceCreditLabel || layer.__mcmsAllianceCreditLayer ||
17830:             layer.__mcmsMissionAgeLabel || layer.__mcmsMissionAgeLayer ||
17831:             layer.__mcmsUnitCommitmentLabel || layer.__mcmsUnitCommitmentLayer ||
17832:             layer.__mcmsTransportWatcherLabel || layer.__mcmsTransportWatcherLayer ||
17833:             layer.__mcmsResourceGapLabel || layer.__mcmsResourceGapLayer ||
17834:             layer.__mcmsStuckMissionLabel || layer.__mcmsStuckMissionLayer ||
17835:             layer.__mcmsMissionSpawnLabel || layer.__mcmsMissionSpawnRing || layer.__mcmsMissionSpawnLayer ||
17836:             layer.__mcmsMissionLockOnMarker || layer.__mcmsMissionLockOnLayer
17837:         ));
17838:     }
17839: 
17840:     let enabledMapRefreshTimer = null;
17841:     let pendingEnabledMapRefresh = { includeSnapshots: false, positionPanel: false, refreshOperational: false, fullRefresh: false };
17842: 
17843:     function flushEnabledMapRefreshes() {
17844:         enabledMapRefreshTimer = null;
17845:         if (runtime.destroyed) return;
17846:         const request = pendingEnabledMapRefresh;
17847:         pendingEnabledMapRefresh = { includeSnapshots: false, positionPanel: false, refreshOperational: false, fullRefresh: false };
17848: 
17849:         if (request.fullRefresh && markerClassificationNeeded()) scheduleMarkerClassification();
17850:         if (state.coverage.enabled) scheduleCoverageRefresh();
17851:         if (state.heatmap.enabled) scheduleHeatmapRefresh();
17852:         if (request.fullRefresh && state.allianceCredits) scheduleAllianceCreditRefresh();
17853:         if (request.fullRefresh && state.missionAge) scheduleMissionAgeRefresh();
17854:         if (request.fullRefresh && state.unitCommitment) scheduleUnitCommitmentRefresh();
17855:         if (request.fullRefresh && state.resourceGap.enabled) scheduleResourceGapRefresh();
17856:         if (request.includeSnapshots && missionSnapshotsNeeded()) {
17857:             scheduleMissionSnapshotRefresh();
17858:         } else if (request.fullRefresh) {
17859:             if (state.transportWatcher) scheduleTransportWatcherRefresh();
17860:             if (state.stuckDetector.enabled) scheduleStuckMissionRefresh();
17861:         }
17862:         if (request.refreshOperational && operationalUiIsVisible()) scheduleOperationalPanelsRender(800);
17863:         if (request.positionPanel && !dragState) schedulePanelPosition(true, 60);
17864:     }
17865: 
17866:     function scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots = true, positionPanel = false, refreshOperational = true, mapOnly = false } = {}) {
17867:         pendingEnabledMapRefresh.includeSnapshots ||= Boolean(includeSnapshots);
17868:         pendingEnabledMapRefresh.positionPanel ||= Boolean(positionPanel);
17869:         pendingEnabledMapRefresh.refreshOperational ||= Boolean(refreshOperational);
17870:         pendingEnabledMapRefresh.fullRefresh ||= !mapOnly;
17871:         if (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving) return;
17872:         if (enabledMapRefreshTimer !== null) return;
17873:         enabledMapRefreshTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(flushEnabledMapRefreshes, state.economyMode ? 180 : 35);
17874:     }
17875: 
17876:     function reconcileFeatureRefreshes({ includeSnapshots = true, positionPanel = false } = {}) {
17877:         if (!state.coverage.enabled) clearCoverageRings();
17878:         if (!state.heatmap.enabled) clearCoverageHeatmap();
17879:         if (!state.allianceCredits) clearAllianceCreditLabels();
17880:         if (!state.missionAge) clearMissionAgeLabels();
17881:         if (!state.unitCommitment) clearUnitCommitmentLabels();
17882:         if (!state.transportWatcher) clearTransportWatcherLabels();
17883:         if (!state.stuckDetector.enabled) clearStuckMissionLabels();
17884:         if (!state.resourceGap.enabled) {
17885:             clearResourceGapLabels();
17886:             resourceGapAnalysisCache.clear();
17887:             resourceGapVehicleContextCache = { key: '', createdAt: 0, available: [], byToken: new Map() };
17888:         }
17889:         if (!state.missionInspector) hideMissionInspector();
17890:         if (state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled) scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(80);
17891:         else removeMajorIncidentFeed();
17892:         scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots, positionPanel });
17893:     }
17894: 
17895:     function detachMapEvents(map) {
17896:         if (!map) return;
17897:         for (let index = runtime.mapBindings.length - 1; index >= 0; index -= 1) {
17898:             const binding = runtime.mapBindings[index];
17899:             if (binding.map !== map) continue;
17900:             try { binding.map.off(binding.types, binding.handler); } catch (err) {}
17901:             runtime.mapBindings.splice(index, 1);

===== LINES 20943-21084 =====
20943:                 if (id !== null) return id;
20944:             }
20945:         }
20946: 
20947:         if (doc !== document) {
20948:             try {
20949:                 const id = missionValueIdFromUrl(doc.location?.href, location.href);
20950:                 if (id !== null) return id;
20951:             } catch (err) {}
20952:         }
20953:         return null;
20954:     }
20955: 
20956:     function missionValueMountForRoot(root) {
20957:         if (!root) return null;
20958:         const selector = '.lightbox_content, .modal-body, #mission_content, .mission_content, [data-mission-content]';
20959:         try {
20960:             if (root.matches?.(selector)) return root;
20961:             return root.querySelector?.(selector) || root;
20962:         } catch (err) {
20963:             return root;
20964:         }
20965:     }
20966: 
20967:     function missionValueWindowCandidates() {
20968:         const candidates = new Map();
20969:         const add = root => {
20970:             if (!root?.isConnected) return;
20971:             const missionId = missionValueIdFromElement(root);
20972:             if (missionId === null) return;
20973:             const mount = missionValueMountForRoot(root);
20974:             if (!mount?.isConnected || mount.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.panelId}, #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId}`)) return;
20975:             if (!candidates.has(mount)) candidates.set(mount, { root, mount, missionId });
20976:         };
20977: 
20978:         transportSweepVisibleWindowRoots().forEach(add);
20979:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
20980:             observeMissionValueDocument(context.doc);
20981:             if (context.doc !== document) {
20982:                 try {
20983:                     if (missionValueIdFromUrl(context.doc.location?.href, location.href) !== null) add(context.doc.body);
20984:                 } catch (err) {}
20985:             }
20986:         }
20987:         return Array.from(candidates.values());
20988:     }
20989: 
20990:     function removeMissionValueRows(scope = document) {
20991:         try { scope.querySelectorAll?.('.mcms-mission-value-row').forEach(row => row.remove()); } catch (err) {}
20992:     }
20993: 
20994:     function clearMissionValueIndicators() {
20995:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) removeMissionValueRows(context.doc);
20996:     }
20997: 
20998: 
20999:     function missionValueVisibleControlRect(element) {
21000:         if (!element?.isConnected || element.closest?.('.mcms-mission-value-row')) return null;
21001:         try {
21002:             const view = element.ownerDocument?.defaultView || pageWindow;
21003:             const style = view?.getComputedStyle?.(element);
21004:             if (style?.display === 'none' || style?.visibility === 'hidden' || style?.visibility === 'collapse' || Number(style?.opacity) === 0) return null;
21005:         } catch (err) {}
21006:         try {
21007:             const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect?.();
21008:             if (!rect || rect.width <= 2 || rect.height <= 2 || rect.width > 96 || rect.height > 64) return null;
21009:             return rect;
21010:         } catch (err) {
21011:             return null;
21012:         }
21013:     }
21014: 
21015:     function missionValueRightControlOffset(candidate) {
21016:         const { root, mount } = candidate || {};
21017:         const fallback = 72;
21018:         if (!root?.querySelectorAll || !mount?.getBoundingClientRect) return fallback;
21019: 
21020:         let mountRect = null;
21021:         try { mountRect = mount.getBoundingClientRect(); } catch (err) {}
21022:         if (!mountRect || mountRect.width <= 0) return fallback;
21023: 
21024:         const topBandBottom = mountRect.top + Math.min(58, Math.max(40, mountRect.height * 0.14));
21025:         const rightBandWidth = Math.min(160, Math.max(92, mountRect.width * 0.10));
21026:         const rightBandStart = mountRect.right - rightBandWidth;
21027:         const selector = 'button, a, [role="button"], [onclick], [data-dismiss], [aria-label], [title], .close, .lightbox-close, .glyphicon, .fa, .fas, .far, svg';
21028:         let controls = [];
21029:         try { controls = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll(selector)); } catch (err) {}
21030: 
21031:         let leftEdge = null;
21032:         for (const control of controls) {
21033:             const rect = missionValueVisibleControlRect(control);
21034:             if (!rect) continue;
21035:             if (rect.bottom < mountRect.top - 2 || rect.top > topBandBottom) continue;
21036:             if (rect.right < rightBandStart || rect.left >= mountRect.right + 2) continue;
21037:             leftEdge = leftEdge === null ? rect.left : Math.min(leftEdge, rect.left);
21038:         }
21039: 
21040:         if (leftEdge === null) return fallback;
21041:         const measured = Math.ceil(mountRect.right - leftEdge + 16);
21042:         const maximum = Math.max(fallback, Math.floor(mountRect.width * 0.42));
21043:         return Math.max(fallback, Math.min(maximum, measured));
21044:     }
21045: 
21046:     function positionMissionValueRow(candidate, row) {
21047:         if (!row) return;
21048:         const offset = missionValueRightControlOffset(candidate);
21049:         row.style.setProperty('padding-right', `${offset}px`, 'important');
21050:         row.dataset.mcmsRightOffset = String(offset);
21051:     }
21052: 
21053:     function syncMissionValueCandidate(candidate) {
21054:         const { mount, missionId } = candidate || {};
21055:         if (!mount?.isConnected || missionId === null) return false;
21056:         const marker = getMissionMarkerIndex().byId.get(missionId) || getMissionMarkerIndex().byId.get(String(missionId)) || null;
21057:         const snapshot = liveMissionSnapshots.get(missionId) || liveMissionSnapshots.get(String(missionId)) || missionSnapshotCache.get(missionId) || missionSnapshotCache.get(String(missionId)) || null;
21058:         const details = criticalMissionValueDetails({ missionId, marker, snapshot });
21059:         const formatted = formatMissionWindowValue(details.value);
21060: 
21061:         let rows = [];
21062:         try { rows = Array.from(mount.querySelectorAll(':scope > .mcms-mission-value-row')); } catch (err) {
21063:             try { rows = Array.from(mount.children || []).filter(child => child.classList?.contains('mcms-mission-value-row')); } catch (innerErr) {}
21064:         }
21065:         const row = rows.shift() || null;
21066:         rows.forEach(extra => extra.remove());
21067:         if (!formatted) {
21068:             row?.remove();
21069:             return false;
21070:         }
21071: 
21072:         const doc = mount.ownerDocument || document;
21073:         const nextRow = row || doc.createElement('div');
21074:         if (!row) {
21075:             nextRow.className = 'mcms-mission-value-row';
21076:             nextRow.setAttribute('data-mcms-mission-value', 'true');
21077:             const badge = doc.createElement('span');
21078:             badge.className = 'mcms-mission-value-badge';
21079:             nextRow.appendChild(badge);
21080:             mount.insertBefore(nextRow, mount.firstChild || null);
21081:         }
21082:         nextRow.dataset.mcmsMissionId = String(missionId);
21083:         const badge = nextRow.querySelector('.mcms-mission-value-badge');
21084:         if (!badge) return false;

===== LINES 21120-21292 =====
21120:     }
21121: 
21122:     function ensureMissionValueDocumentStyle(doc) {
21123:         if (!doc || doc === document) return;
21124:         const styleId = 'mcms-mission-value-document-style';
21125:         if (doc.getElementById?.(styleId)) return;
21126:         const style = doc.createElement?.('style');
21127:         if (!style) return;
21128:         style.id = styleId;
21129:         style.textContent = `
21130:             .mcms-mission-value-row {
21131:                 display:flex !important;align-items:center !important;justify-content:flex-end !important;
21132:                 width:100% !important;min-height:30px !important;box-sizing:border-box !important;
21133:                 margin:0 0 8px 0 !important;padding:5px 46px 5px 8px !important;clear:both !important;
21134:                 position:relative !important;z-index:2 !important;pointer-events:none !important;
21135:             }
21136:             .mcms-mission-value-badge {
21137:                 display:inline-flex !important;align-items:center !important;justify-content:center !important;
21138:                 max-width:min(100%,260px) !important;min-height:25px !important;box-sizing:border-box !important;
21139:                 padding:4px 10px !important;border:1px solid rgba(235,190,64,.72) !important;border-radius:8px !important;
21140:                 background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(48,39,13,.96),rgba(19,21,24,.96)) !important;
21141:                 color:#ffe59a !important;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.34) !important;
21142:                 font:900 11px/1.25 Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif !important;letter-spacing:.15px !important;
21143:                 text-align:right !important;white-space:nowrap !important;overflow:hidden !important;
21144:                 text-overflow:ellipsis !important;pointer-events:none !important;
21145:             }
21146:             @media (max-width:520px) {
21147:                 .mcms-mission-value-row { padding-right:40px !important; }
21148:                 .mcms-mission-value-badge { max-width:100% !important;font-size:10px !important; }
21149:             }
21150:         `;
21151:         (doc.head || doc.documentElement)?.appendChild(style);
21152:     }
21153: 
21154:     function clearMissionValueDocumentStyles() {
21155:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
21156:             if (context.doc === document) continue;
21157:             try { context.doc.getElementById?.('mcms-mission-value-document-style')?.remove(); } catch (err) {}
21158:         }
21159:     }
21160: 
21161:     function observeMissionValueFrame(frame) {
21162:         if (!frame || missionValueObservedFrames.has(frame)) return;
21163:         missionValueObservedFrames.add(frame);
21164:         const onLoad = () => scheduleMissionValueScan(40);
21165:         frame.addEventListener('load', onLoad);
21166:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => frame.removeEventListener('load', onLoad));
21167:     }
21168: 
21169:     function observeMissionValueDocument(doc) {
21170:         if (!doc) return;
21171:         ensureMissionValueDocumentStyle(doc);
21172:         if (missionValueObservedDocuments.has(doc)) return;
21173:         missionValueObservedDocuments.add(doc);
21174:         let frames = [];
21175:         try { frames = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('iframe, frame')); } catch (err) {}
21176:         frames.forEach(observeMissionValueFrame);
21177:         const root = doc.documentElement || doc.body;
21178:         if (!root) return;
21179:         const activitySelector = '#lightbox_box, #lightbox, .lightbox_content, .modal, [role="dialog"], .ui-dialog, iframe, frame, a[href*="/missions/"], form[action*="/missions/"]';
21180:         const observer = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserver(mutations => {
21181:             const relevant = mutations.some(mutation => Array.from(mutation.addedNodes || []).concat(Array.from(mutation.removedNodes || [])).some(node => {
21182:                 if (node?.nodeType !== 1) return false;
21183:                 if (node.matches?.(activitySelector)) return true;
21184:                 return Boolean(node.querySelector?.(activitySelector));
21185:             }));
21186:             if (!relevant) return;
21187:             try { doc.querySelectorAll('iframe, frame').forEach(observeMissionValueFrame); } catch (err) {}
21188:             scheduleMissionValueScan(50);
21189:         }));
21190:         observer.observe(root, { childList: true, subtree: true });
21191:     }
21192: 
21193:     function installMissionValueWindows() {
21194:         if (!missionValueFeatureInstalled) {
21195:             missionValueFeatureInstalled = true;
21196:             runtimeOnCleanup(() => {
21197:                 runtimeClearTimeout(missionValueScanTimer);
21198:                 missionValueScanTimer = null;
21199:                 clearMissionValueIndicators();
21200:                 clearMissionValueDocumentStyles();
21201:             });
21202:         }
21203:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) observeMissionValueDocument(context.doc);
21204:         scheduleMissionValueScan(0);
21205:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => scheduleMissionValueScan(0), 180);
21206:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => scheduleMissionValueScan(0), 800);
21207:     }
21208: 
21209:     function criticalMissionValueForEntry(entry) {
21210:         return criticalMissionValueDetails(entry).value;
21211:     }
21212: 
21213:     function criticalValueEligible(entry) {
21214:         return selectedCriticalValueMode() === 'total' || Boolean(entry?.eligibleForCredits);
21215:     }
21216: 
21217:     function criticalValueGroup(entries, predicate = () => true) {
21218:         let total = 0;
