21219:         let known = 0;
21220:         let unknown = 0;
21221:         let eligible = 0;
21222:         const seenMissionIds = new Set();
21223:         const sources = new Map();
21224:         for (const entry of entries) {
21225:             if (!predicate(entry) || !criticalValueEligible(entry)) continue;
21226:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(entry?.missionId);
21227:             if (missionId !== null && seenMissionIds.has(missionId)) continue;
21228:             if (missionId !== null) seenMissionIds.add(missionId);
21229:             if (entry?.eligibleForCredits) eligible += 1;
21230:             const details = criticalMissionValueDetails(entry);
21231:             const value = details.value;
21232:             if (value === null || !Number.isFinite(Number(value))) {
21233:                 unknown += 1;
21234:                 continue;
21235:             }
21236:             total += Math.max(0, Number(value) || 0);
21237:             known += 1;
21238:             sources.set(details.source, (sources.get(details.source) || 0) + 1);
21239:         }
21240:         return { total: Math.round(total), known, unknown, eligible, count: seenMissionIds.size, sources };
21241:     }
21242: 
21243:     function criticalValueDisplay(group) {
21244:         if (!group?.known) return 'UNKNOWN';
21245:         return `≈${formatOperationalCompactCredits(group.total)} CR`;
21246:     }
21247: 
21248:     function criticalValueCoverage(group) {
21249:         return `${group.known.toLocaleString('en-GB')} / ${(group.known + group.unknown).toLocaleString('en-GB')} valued`;
21250:     }
21251: 
21252:     function criticalValueTitle(label, group) {
21253:         const knownText = `${group.known.toLocaleString('en-GB')} valued mission${group.known === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
21254:         const unknownText = group.unknown ? ` · ${group.unknown.toLocaleString('en-GB')} value${group.unknown === 1 ? '' : 's'} unavailable` : '';
21255:         return `${label}: approximately ${group.total.toLocaleString('en-GB')} credits from MissionChief average-credit data · ${knownText}${unknownText}`;
21256:     }
21257: 
21258:     function criticalValuesHtml(allEntries, visibleEntries) {
21259:         const scopedEntries = visibleEntries;
21260:         const noScene = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries, entry => Boolean(entry?.units?.known) && Math.max(0, Number(entry?.units?.onScene) || 0) === 0);
21261:         const assistance = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries, entry => criticalEntryPrimaryStatus(entry) === 'assistance');
21262:         const visible = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries);
21263:         const mode = selectedCriticalValueMode();
21264:         const showingText = `${mode === 'eligible' ? 'Eligible' : 'Total'} MissionChief average credits for ${visibleEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} currently visible mission${visibleEntries.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
21265:         const valueCard = (className, label, group) => `<div class="mcms-critical-value-card ${className}" title="${escapeHtml(criticalValueTitle(label, group))}"><span>${escapeHtml(label)}</span><strong>${escapeHtml(criticalValueDisplay(group))}</strong><small>${escapeHtml(criticalValueCoverage(group))}</small></div>`;
21266:         return `
21267:             <div class="mcms-critical-values-label" title="${escapeHtml(showingText)}"><strong>MISSION</strong><span>VALUE</span></div>
21268:             <div class="mcms-critical-value-mode" role="group" aria-label="Mission value mode">
21269:                 <button type="button" data-critical-value-mode="total" class="${mode === 'total' ? 'mcms-filter-active' : ''}" aria-pressed="${mode === 'total'}">TOTAL</button>
21270:                 <button type="button" data-critical-value-mode="eligible" class="${mode === 'eligible' ? 'mcms-filter-active' : ''}" aria-pressed="${mode === 'eligible'}">ELIGIBLE</button>
21271:             </div>
21272:             <div class="mcms-critical-values-grid">
21273:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-no-scene', 'No Scene', noScene)}
21274:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-assistance', 'Assistance', assistance)}
21275:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-all', 'Visible Value', visible)}
21276:             </div>
21277:             <span class="mcms-critical-showing">SHOWING ${visibleEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} OF ${allEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} MISSIONS</span>`;
21278:     }
21279: 
21280:     function criticalSummaryHtml(allEntries) {
21281:         const baseForStatus = criticalFilterEntries(allEntries, ['status']);
21282:         const baseForOnWay = criticalFilterEntries(allEntries, ['onway']);
21283:         const baseForMyUnits = criticalFilterEntries(allEntries, ['myunits']);
21284:         const statusCounts = { all: baseForStatus.length, attention: 0, 'no-scene': 0, assistance: 0, clearing: 0, 'on-scene': 0, syncing: 0 };
21285:         for (const entry of baseForStatus) {
21286:             const key = criticalEntryPrimaryStatus(entry);
21287:             if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(statusCounts, key)) statusCounts[key] += 1;
21288:             if (key === 'no-scene' || key === 'assistance') statusCounts.attention += 1;
21289:         }
21290:         let onWayMissions = 0;
21291:         let onWayVehicles = 0;
21292:         for (const entry of baseForOnWay) {

===== LINES 23944-24068 =====
23944:         observedCreditsElement = element;
23945:         processCreditTotal(element.textContent);
23946:         creditsValueObserver = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserver(() => processCreditTotal(element.textContent)));
23947:         creditsValueObserver.observe(element, { childList: true, subtree: true, characterData: true });
23948:         return true;
23949:     }

23976:     const BUILTIN_FINANCIAL_RULES = Object.freeze([
23977:         { id: 'income-refund', direction: 'income', match: 'regex', pattern: 'refund|reimburse|cancel(?:ed|led)?', key: 'refunds', label: 'Refunds & Reimbursements', accountingGroup: 'otherIncome', missionType: '', confidence: 0.98 },

23979:         { id: 'income-patient', direction: 'income', match: 'regex', pattern: 'patient (?:transport|treatment)|hospital\\s*-\\s*alliance', key: 'patientIncome', label: 'Patient Transport & Treatment', accountingGroup: 'operatingIncome', missionType: 'transport', confidence: 0.98 },
23980:         { id: 'income-prisoner', direction: 'income', match: 'regex', pattern: 'prisoner.*transport|police\\s*-\\s*alliance', key: 'prisonerIncome', label: 'Prisoner Transport', accountingGroup: 'operatingIncome', missionType: 'transport', confidence: 0.98 },
23981:         { id: 'income-login', direction: 'income', match: 'contains', pattern: 'daily login reward', key: 'dailyLogin', label: 'Daily Login Rewards', accountingGroup: 'otherIncome', missionType: '', confidence: 0.99 },
23982:         { id: 'income-task', direction: 'income', match: 'contains', pattern: 'completed task', key: 'taskRewards', label: 'Task Rewards', accountingGroup: 'otherIncome', missionType: 'task', confidence: 0.97 },
23983:         { id: 'income-event', direction: 'income', match: 'regex', pattern: 'event|bonus|reward', key: 'eventBonus', label: 'Event & Bonus Income', accountingGroup: 'otherIncome', missionType: '', confidence: 0.78 },
23984:         { id: 'spend-vehicle', direction: 'spending', match: 'regex', pattern: 'vehicle bought|vehicle purchase|bought vehicle', key: 'vehicles', label: 'Vehicle Purchases', accountingGroup: 'capitalInvestment', missionType: '', confidence: 0.99 },
23985:         { id: 'spend-vehicle-upgrade', direction: 'spending', match: 'regex', pattern: 'vehicle.*upgrad|upgrade.*vehicle|vehicle equipment|equipment for .*vehicle', key: 'vehicleUpgrades', label: 'Vehicle Upgrades & Equipment', accountingGroup: 'capitalInvestment', missionType: '', confidence: 0.94 },
23986:         { id: 'spend-building', direction: 'spending', match: 'regex', pattern: 'building constructed|station constructed|new building', excludePattern: 'building complex.*upgrad|upgraded to building complex', key: 'buildings', label: 'Buildings & Stations', accountingGroup: 'capitalInvestment', missionType: '', confidence: 0.98 },
23987:         { id: 'spend-extension', direction: 'spending', match: 'regex', pattern: 'upgrad|extended guard|extension|speciali[sz]ation built|attached building|building complex', key: 'extensions', label: 'Extensions & Building Upgrades', accountingGroup: 'capitalInvestment', missionType: '', confidence: 0.90 },
23988:         { id: 'spend-training', direction: 'spending', match: 'regex', pattern: 'education|training|school|course|applicant', key: 'training', label: 'Training & Education', accountingGroup: 'operatingExpense', missionType: '', confidence: 0.93 },
23989:         { id: 'spend-recruitment', direction: 'spending', match: 'regex', pattern: 'recruit|personnel|staff|hire', key: 'recruitment', label: 'Recruitment & Staffing', accountingGroup: 'operatingExpense', missionType: '', confidence: 0.90 },
23990:         { id: 'spend-alliance', direction: 'spending', match: 'regex', pattern: 'alliance|association|verband|fund|donation|contribution', key: 'allianceSpending', label: 'Alliance Contributions', accountingGroup: 'operatingExpense', missionType: '', confidence: 0.92 }
23991:     ]);
23992:     const BUILTIN_FINANCIAL_FALLBACKS = Object.freeze({
23993:         income: { id: 'fallback-income', key: 'unclassifiedIncome', label: 'Unclassified Positive Income', accountingGroup: 'otherIncome', missionType: '', confidence: 0.35 },
23994:         spending: { id: 'fallback-spending', key: 'unclassifiedSpending', label: 'Unclassified Spending', accountingGroup: 'operatingExpense', missionType: '', confidence: 0.25 }
23995:     });
23996:     const BUILTIN_FINANCIAL_POLICY = Object.freeze({
23997:         schema: 2,
23998:         version: 'built-in',
23999:         risk: {
24000:             classificationCritical: 80,
24001:             classificationWarning: 92,
24002:             capitalIncomeRatio: 150,
24003:             allianceConcentration: 75,
24004:             categoryConcentration: 80,
24005:             volatilityWarning: 120,
24006:             revenueContraction: -20,
24007:             drawdownWarning: 30,
24008:             runwayCriticalDays: 3
24009:         },
24010:         scan: { pageCap: 5000, batchSize: 3, retryAttempts: 3, checkpointPages: 100 }
24011:     });
24012:     let activeFinancialRules = BUILTIN_FINANCIAL_RULES.map(rule => compileFinancialRule({ ...rule, source: 'built-in' }));
24013:     let activeFinancialFallbacks = { income: { ...BUILTIN_FINANCIAL_FALLBACKS.income }, spending: { ...BUILTIN_FINANCIAL_FALLBACKS.spending } };
24014:     let activeFinancialRuleVersion = 'built-in';
24015:     let activeFinancialPolicy = clonePlainData(BUILTIN_FINANCIAL_POLICY);
24016:     let activeFinancialPolicyVersion = 'built-in';
24017:     let financeVaultStoreMemory = null;
24018:     const financeVaultProfileMemory = new Map();
24019: 
24020:     function financeNormaliseText(value) {
24021:         return String(value || '').normalize('NFKC').replace(/\s+/gu, ' ').trim();
24022:     }
24023: 
24024:     function financeHashString(value) {
24025:         const text = String(value || '');
24026:         let first = 0x811c9dc5;
24027:         let second = 0x9e3779b9;
24028:         for (let index = 0; index < text.length; index++) {
24029:             const code = text.charCodeAt(index);
24030:             first ^= code;
24031:             first = Math.imul(first, 0x01000193) >>> 0;
24032:             second ^= code + index;
24033:             second = Math.imul(second, 0x85ebca6b) >>> 0;
24034:         }
24035:         return `${first.toString(36).padStart(7, '0')}${second.toString(36).padStart(7, '0')}`;
24036:     }
24037: 
24038:     function compileFinancialRule(rule) {
24039:         const compiled = { ...rule };
24040:         compiled.patternRegex = null;
24041:         compiled.excludeRegex = null;
24042:         if (compiled.match === 'regex') {
24043:             try { compiled.patternRegex = new RegExp(compiled.pattern, 'iu'); } catch (err) {}
24044:         }
24045:         if (compiled.excludePattern) {
24046:             try { compiled.excludeRegex = new RegExp(compiled.excludePattern, 'iu'); } catch (err) {}
24047:         }
24048:         return compiled;
24049:     }
24050: 
24051:     function financeRandomToken(byteLength = 24) {
24052:         const bytes = new Uint8Array(Math.max(16, Number(byteLength) || 24));
24053:         const cryptoObject = pageWindow.crypto || globalThis.crypto;
24054:         if (cryptoObject?.getRandomValues) cryptoObject.getRandomValues(bytes);
24055:         else for (let index = 0; index < bytes.length; index++) bytes[index] = Math.floor(Math.random() * 256);
24056:         let binary = '';
24057:         for (const byte of bytes) binary += String.fromCharCode(byte);
24058:         return btoa(binary).replace(/\+/gu, '-').replace(/\//gu, '_').replace(/=+$/gu, '');
24059:     }
24060: 
24061:     function financePlayerIdentity(account = null) {
24062:         const id = account?.userId ?? currentUserIdCached();
24063:         const name = financeNormaliseText(account?.userName || document.querySelector?.('#navbar_profile_link, a[href*="/profile/"]')?.textContent || '');
24064:         return { id: id === undefined || id === null || id === '' ? null : String(id), name: name.slice(0, 120) };
24065:     }
24066: 
24067:     function financePlayerProfileKey(player) {
24068:         if (player?.id) return `id:${String(player.id)}`;

26666:             state.autoNight.enabled = !state.autoNight.enabled;
26667:             state.autoNight.lastBucket = '';
26668:         }

26671:         if (feature === 'vehicles') state.visibility.vehicles = !state.visibility.vehicles;

26687:         }

26690:         if (feature === 'missionAge') showToast(state.missionAge ? 'Personal mission age on' : 'Personal mission age off');

26707:         }

26710:             if (state.allianceBuildingsMap === false) {

26713:                 installAllianceBuildingsContextWatcherEarly();
26714:             } else {

26716:             }

26718:             if (isAllianceBuildingsContext()) runtimeSetTimeout(() => location.reload(), 180);
26719:         }
26720:         if (feature === 'missionInspector') showToast(state.missionInspector ? 'Mission Inspector on' : 'Mission Inspector off');
26721:         if (feature === 'stuckDetector') showToast(state.stuckDetector.enabled ? `Stuck detector on · ${state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin} min` : 'Stuck detector off');
26722:         if (feature === 'missionSpawn') showToast(state.missionSpawn.enabled ? 'New mission animation on' : 'New mission animation off');

26724:             if (state.resourceGap.enabled) refreshPersonalVehicleData(false).then(() => { scheduleResourceGapRefresh(0); refreshVisibleMissionInspector(); });
26725:             showToast(state.resourceGap.enabled ? `Resource Gap on · ${state.resourceGap.radiusMi}mi` : 'Resource Gap off');
26726:         }
26727:         if (feature === 'payoutSound') showToast(state.payoutFlash.soundEnabled ? 'Theme audio on · hosted MP3 cues load only when played' : 'Theme audio off');
26728:         if (feature === 'payoutFlash') showToast(state.payoutFlash.enabled ? 'Emergency payout flash on' : 'Emergency payout flash off');
26729:         if (feature === 'autoNight') runAutoNight(true);
26730:     }
26731: 
26732:     function runAutoNight(force = false) {
26733:         if (!state.autoNight.enabled) return;
26734:         const bucket = isNightNow(state.autoNight.nightStart, state.autoNight.dayStart) ? 'night' : 'day';
26735:         if (!force && state.autoNight.lastBucket === bucket) return;
26736:         state.autoNight.lastBucket = bucket;
26737:         state.theme = bucket === 'night' ? normaliseTheme(state.autoNight.nightTheme) : normaliseTheme(state.autoNight.dayTheme);
26738:         saveState();
26739:         applyRootAttributes();
26740:         updateUI();
26741:     }
26742: 
26743:     function isNightNow(start, end) {
26744:         const now = new Date();
26745:         const current = now.getHours() * 60 + now.getMinutes();
26746:         const startMin = parseTime(start, 19 * 60);
26747:         const endMin = parseTime(end, 7 * 60);
26748:         if (startMin === endMin) return false;
26749:         if (startMin < endMin) return current >= startMin && current < endMin;
26750:         return current >= startMin || current < endMin;
26751:     }
26752: 
26753:     function parseTime(value, fallback) {
26754:         const match = String(value || '').match(/^(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})$/);
26755:         if (!match) return fallback;
26756:         return clamp(match[1], 0, 23, Math.floor(fallback / 60)) * 60 + clamp(match[2], 0, 59, fallback % 60);
26757:     }
26758: 
26759:     function shouldSuppressControl() {
26760:         if (state.cleanMode) return false;
26761:         if (document.body && document.body.classList.contains('modal-open')) return true;
26762: 
26763:         return SUPPRESSION_SELECTORS.some(selector => {
26764:             let nodes;
26765:             try { nodes = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(selector)); } catch (err) { return false; }
26766:             return nodes.some(el => {
26767:                 if (!el || el.closest(`#${SCRIPT.controlId}`) || el.closest(`#${SCRIPT.panelId}`)) return false;
26768:                 if (!isVisible(el)) return false;
26769:                 const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
26770:                 return (rect.width * rect.height) > 1200;
26771:             });
26772:         });
26773:     }
26774: 
26775:     function refreshSuppression() {
26776:         const control = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId);
26777:         if (!control) return;
26778:         control.classList.toggle('mcms-hidden-by-menu', shouldSuppressControl());
26779:     }
26780: 
26781:     function fitControlToMap() {
26782:         runtimeClearTimeout(fitTimer);
26783:         fitTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
26784:             const panel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
26785:             const mapEl = getLargestLeafletMap();
26786:             if (!mapEl) {
26787:                 if (!isTouchLayoutActive()) {
26788:                     observeDesktopPanelWorkspace(null);
26789:                     applyDesktopPanelSizing(panel, null);

27637:                 <div class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">Flash duration (sec)</span><input class="mcms-input" type="number" min="2" max="30" step="2" data-setting="payout-duration"></div>

27639:                 <div class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">Test payout tier</span><select class="mcms-select" data-setting="payout-test-amount"><option value="10000">10K Standard</option><option value="25000">25K Major</option><option value="50000">50K High Value</option><option value="100000">100K Elite</option></select></div>
27640:                 <button class="mcms-small-btn" style="width:100% !important;margin-bottom:8px !important" type="button" data-action="test-payout-flash">Test Emergency Flash</button>
27641:                 <div class="mcms-status">Vice City Inspired, Bad Company Inspired, Scarface Inspired and Cyberpunk Inspired use hosted cashout MP3s from your public GitHub asset repository. Other templates retain synthesized cues. Enable Theme Audio, set the volume, then use Test Emergency Flash.</div>
27642:             </section>

27680:                 <div class="mcms-status mcms-discord-status" data-finance-rule-status data-tone="neutral">Built-in financial intelligence active.</div>
27681:                 <div class="mcms-status">GitHub hosts public transaction-classification rules and audit policy only. The Toolkit never uploads player ledger data, Discord webhooks or repository credentials. The local archive is indexed by MissionChief player ID/name and can be transferred between devices using Export Archive / Import Archive or the complete private Toolkit backup.</div>
27682:                 <div class="mcms-status mcms-finance-private-note">Private backup warning: Export All includes your Discord webhook and locally stored MissionChief financial history. Anyone holding the file may post through the webhook and inspect the exported game ledger.</div>

===== LINES 27906-28123 =====
27906:                 ? `data-action="place-go" data-place="${escapeHtml(entry.id)}"`
27907:                 : `data-action="bookmark-go" data-slot="${entry.index}"`;
27908:             const className = entry.kind === 'quick' ? 'mcms-pin-quick' : 'mcms-pin-custom';
27909:             return `<button class="mcms-screen-pin-btn ${className}" type="button" ${action} data-full-label="${escapeHtml(entry.fullName)}" data-smart-label="${escapeHtml(entry.label)}" title="Jump to ${escapeHtml(entry.fullName)}" aria-label="Jump to ${escapeHtml(entry.fullName)}">${escapeHtml(entry.label)}</button>`;
27910:         }).join('');
27911:         if (isTouchLayoutActive()) fitControlToMap();
27912:     }
27913: 
27914:     function handleAction(button) {
27915:         const action = button.dataset.action;
27916:         if (action === 'place-go') {
27917:             const place = QUICK_PLACES.find(item => item.id === button.dataset.place);
27918:             if (place && setMapView(place.lat, place.lng, place.zoom)) showToast(place.name);
27919:             return;
27920:         }
27921:         if (action === 'quick-pin') { toggleQuickPin(button.dataset.place); return; }
27922:         if (action === 'bookmark-save') { saveBookmark(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
27923:         if (action === 'bookmark-label') { editBookmarkLabel(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
27924:         if (action === 'bookmark-go') { goBookmark(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
27925:         if (action === 'bookmark-delete') { deleteBookmark(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
27926:         if (action === 'bookmark-pin') { toggleBookmarkPin(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
27927:         if (action === 'nudge-left') { nudgeControl(-4, 0); return; }
27928:         if (action === 'nudge-right') { nudgeControl(4, 0); return; }
27929:         if (action === 'nudge-up') { nudgeControl(0, -4); return; }
27930:         if (action === 'nudge-down') { nudgeControl(0, 4); return; }
27931:         if (action === 'nudge-reset') { resetNudge(); return; }
27932:         if (action === 'panel-left') { nudgePanel(-24, 0); return; }
27933:         if (action === 'panel-right') { nudgePanel(24, 0); return; }
27934:         if (action === 'panel-up') { nudgePanel(0, -24); return; }
27935:         if (action === 'panel-down') { nudgePanel(0, 24); return; }
27936:         if (action === 'open-help-center') { openHelpCenter(); return; }
27937:         if (action === 'toggle-economy') { setEconomyMode(!state.economyMode, true); return; }
27938:         if (action === 'open-critical-drawer') { toggleCriticalDrawer(); return; }
27939:         if (action === 'open-vehicle-status') { toggleVehicleCodeStatus(); return; }
27940:         if (action === 'fit-critical') { fitCriticalMissions(); return; }
27941:         if (action === 'scan-transport-sweep') { const queue = buildTransportSweepQueue(); showToast(queue.length ? `${queue.length} transport mission${queue.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} found` : 'No alliance patient transports found'); return; }
27942:         if (action === 'start-transport-sweep') { startTransportSweep(); return; }
27943:         if (action === 'stop-transport-sweep') { stopTransportSweep(); return; }
27944:         if (action === 'reset-session') { resetSessionPerformance(); return; }
27945:         if (action === 'clear-payout-history') { clearPayoutHistory(); return; }
27946:         if (action === 'critical-go') { focusMissionById(button.dataset.missionId, false); return; }
27947:         if (action === 'profile-save') { saveMapProfile(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
27948:         if (action === 'profile-load') { loadMapProfile(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
27949:         if (action === 'profile-delete') { deleteMapProfile(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
27950:         if (action === 'export-config') { exportToolkitConfig(); return; }
27951:         if (action === 'import-config') { document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-import-config-file]`)?.click?.(); return; }
27952:         if (action === 'reset-config') { resetToolkitConfiguration(); return; }
27953:         if (action === 'discord-test') { testDiscordWebhook(); return; }
27954:         if (action === 'discord-generate-post') { postDiscordFinancialReport(); return; }
27955:         if (action === 'discord-clear') { clearDiscordWebhook(); return; }
27956:         if (action === 'finance-archive-scan') { scanFinancialArchive(); return; }
27957:         if (action === 'finance-archive-cancel') { cancelFinancialArchiveScan(); return; }
27958:         if (action === 'finance-archive-export') { exportFinancialArchive(); return; }
27959:         if (action === 'finance-archive-import') { document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-import-finance-file]`)?.click?.(); return; }
27960:         if (action === 'finance-archive-clear') { clearFinancialArchive(); return; }
27961:         if (action === 'finance-rules-refresh') { refreshFinancialIntelligenceFeeds(true).then(() => { renderFinanceVaultStatus(); showToast('GitHub financial intelligence refreshed'); }); return; }
27962:         if (action === 'test-payout-flash') {
27963:             const testAmount = Math.max(1000, Number(document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-setting="payout-test-amount"]`)?.value) || state.payoutFlash.threshold);
27964:             const triggered = triggerPayoutFlash(testAmount, true, { source: 'personal', caption: 'Emergency Response Test' });
27965:             showToast(triggered ? 'Emergency flash test' : 'Emergency flash unavailable: map not detected');
27966:             return;
27967:         }
27968:         if (action === 'panel-reset') resetPanelPosition();
27969:     }
27970: 
27971:     function handleSettingChange(target) {
27972:         const setting = target.dataset.setting;
27973:         if (!setting) return;
27974: 
27975:         if (setting === 'mobile-mode' || setting === 'tablet-mode') {
27976:             const nextValue = ['auto', 'on', 'off'].includes(String(target.value)) ? String(target.value) : 'auto';
27977:             const previousLayout = activeDeviceLayout;
27978:             if (setting === 'mobile-mode') {
27979:                 state.mobileMode = nextValue;
27980:                 if (nextValue === 'on') state.tabletMode = 'off';
27981:             } else {
27982:                 state.tabletMode = nextValue;
27983:                 if (nextValue === 'on') state.mobileMode = 'off';
27984:             }
27985:             saveState();
27986:             applyRootAttributes();
27987:             refreshTabletModeUi();
27988:             if (previousLayout !== activeDeviceLayout && !isTouchLayoutActive()) {
27989:                 clearTabletPanelSizing();
27990:                 clearTabletDockSizing();
27991:             }
27992:             fitControlToMap();
27993:             positionPanelOverlay(true);
27994:             showToast(activeDeviceLayout === 'mobile' ? 'iOS Mobile Mode active' : activeDeviceLayout === 'tablet' ? 'Tablet Mode active' : 'Desktop layout active');
27995:             return;
27996:         }
27997: 
27998:         if (setting === 'major-incident-minimum') {
27999:             state.majorIncidentFeed.minimumCredits = MAJOR_INCIDENT_FEED_MINIMUM_OPTIONS.includes(Number(target.value)) ? Number(target.value) : 25000;
28000:             saveState();
28001:             updateUI();
28002:             refreshMissionSnapshots();
28003:             scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(0);
28004:             showToast(`Major Incident Feed: ${formatOperationalCompactCredits(state.majorIncidentFeed.minimumCredits)}+ credits`);
28005:             return;
28006:         }
28007: 
28008:         if (setting === 'coverage-radius') {
28009:             state.coverage.radiusMi = Number(target.value) || 10;
28010:             saveState();
28011:             updateUI();
28012:             scheduleCoverageRefresh();
28013:             return;
28014:         }
28015: 
28016:         if (setting === 'heatmap-source') state.heatmap.source = target.value === 'vehicles' ? 'vehicles' : 'stations';
28017:         if (setting === 'heatmap-service') state.heatmap.service = ['all', 'fire', 'ambulance', 'police', 'air', 'water'].includes(target.value) ? target.value : 'all';
28018:         if (setting === 'heatmap-radius') state.heatmap.radiusMi = Number(target.value) || 10;
28019:         if (setting === 'heatmap-opacity') state.heatmap.opacity = clamp(target.value, 0.12, 0.55, 0.30);
28020:         if (setting.startsWith('heatmap-')) {
28021:             saveState(); updateUI(); scheduleHeatmapRefresh(); return;
28022:         }
28023: 
28024: 
28025:         if (setting === 'transport-sweep-delay') {
28026:             state.transportSweep.delayMs = TRANSPORT_SWEEP_DELAY_OPTIONS.includes(Number(target.value)) ? Number(target.value) : 2000;
28027:             saveState(); updateUI();
28028:             showToast(`Transport Sweep delay: ${state.transportSweep.delayMs / 1000}s`);
28029:             return;
28030:         }
28031:         if (setting === 'transport-sweep-max') {
28032:             state.transportSweep.maxPerRun = Math.round(clamp(target.value, 1, TRANSPORT_SWEEP_MAX_REQUESTS, 25));
28033:             saveState(); updateUI();
28034:             showToast(`Transport Sweep maximum: ${state.transportSweep.maxPerRun}`);
28035:             return;
28036:         }
28037: 
28038:         if (setting === 'resource-gap-radius') {
28039:             state.resourceGap.radiusMi = RESOURCE_GAP_RADIUS_OPTIONS.includes(Number(target.value)) ? Number(target.value) : 25;
28040:             resourceGapAnalysisCache.clear();
28041:             saveState(); updateUI(); scheduleResourceGapRefresh(0); refreshVisibleMissionInspector();
28042:             showToast(`Resource Gap radius: ${state.resourceGap.radiusMi}mi`);
28043:             return;
28044:         }
28045: 
28046:         if (setting === 'stuck-threshold') {
28047:             state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin = Math.round(clamp(target.value, STUCK_MIN_MINUTES, STUCK_MAX_MINUTES, 20));
28048:             saveState();
28049:             updateUI();
28050:             scheduleStuckMissionRefresh(0);
28051:             showToast(`Stuck missions: ${state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin} minutes`);
28052:             return;
28053:         }
28054: 
28055:         if (setting === 'alliance-credit-minimum') {
28056:             state.allianceCreditMinimum = [0, 5000, 10000, 15000, 20000].includes(Number(target.value)) ? Number(target.value) : 0;
28057:             saveState();
28058:             updateUI();
28059:             scheduleAllianceCreditRefresh(0);
28060:             showToast(state.allianceCreditMinimum ? `Alliance credits: ${state.allianceCreditMinimum / 1000}K+` : 'Alliance credits: all values');
28061:             return;
28062:         }
28063: 
28064:         if (setting === 'discord-webhook') {
28065:             try {
28066:                 saveDiscordWebhookUrl(target.value);
28067:                 setDiscordStatus(target.value ? 'Webhook saved securely in Tampermonkey storage.' : 'Webhook removed.', 'good');
28068:             } catch (err) {
28069:                 setDiscordStatus(err?.message || 'Webhook URL is invalid.', 'bad');
28070:             }
28071:             return;
28072:         }
28073:         if (setting === 'discord-name') {
28074:             state.discordReport.webhookName = String(target.value || 'MissionChief Finance').trim().slice(0, 80) || 'MissionChief Finance';
28075:             saveState(); updateUI();
28076:             return;
28077:         }
28078:         if (setting === 'discord-top-categories') {
28079:             state.discordReport.topCategories = [3, 5, 8].includes(Number(target.value)) ? Number(target.value) : 5;
28080:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
28081:             saveState(); updateUI();
28082:             return;
28083:         }
28084:         if (setting === 'discord-period') {
28085:             state.discordReport.period = ['today', 'yesterday', 'last24', 'last7', 'last30', 'last90', 'last180', 'last365', 'allAvailable', 'session', 'sinceLast', 'custom'].includes(target.value) ? target.value : 'today';
28086:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
28087:             saveState(); updateUI();
28088:             return;
28089:         }
28090:         if (setting === 'discord-custom-start' || setting === 'discord-custom-end') {
28091:             const key = setting === 'discord-custom-start' ? 'customStart' : 'customEnd';
28092:             if (/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/u.test(String(target.value || ''))) state.discordReport[key] = String(target.value);
28093:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
28094:             saveState(); updateUI();
28095:             return;
28096:         }
28097:         if (setting === 'discord-comparison') {
28098:             state.discordReport.includeComparison = String(target.value) !== 'false';
28099:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
28100:             saveState(); updateUI();
28101:             return;
28102:         }
28103:         if (setting === 'discord-chart') {
28104:             state.discordReport.includeChart = String(target.value) !== 'false';
28105:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
28106:             saveState(); updateUI();
28107:             return;
28108:         }
28109: 
28110:         if (setting === 'discord-report-mode') {
28111:             state.discordReport.reportMode = ['executive', 'fullAudit'].includes(String(target.value)) ? String(target.value) : 'fullAudit';
28112:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
28113:             saveState(); updateUI();
28114:             return;
28115:         }
28116:         if (setting === 'discord-risk' || setting === 'discord-forecast') {
28117:             const key = setting === 'discord-risk' ? 'includeRisk' : 'includeForecast';
28118:             state.discordReport[key] = String(target.value) !== 'false';
28119:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
28120:             saveState(); updateUI();
28121:             return;
28122:         }
28123:         if (setting === 'finance-vault-enabled') {

===== LINES 28301-28429 =====
28301:             missionSpawn: state.missionSpawn.enabled,
28302:             resourceGap: state.resourceGap.enabled,
28303:             allianceMissions: state.visibility.allianceMissions,
28304:             myMissions: state.visibility.myMissions,
28305:             vehicles: state.visibility.vehicles,
28306:             buildings: state.visibility.buildings,
28307:             allianceCredits: state.allianceCredits,
28308:             missionAge: state.missionAge,
28309:             transportWatcher: state.transportWatcher,
28310:             unitCommitment: state.unitCommitment,
28311:             criticalView: criticalViewActive
28312:         };
28313: 
28314:         panel.querySelectorAll('[data-toggle]').forEach(btn => {
28315:             const key = btn.dataset.toggle;
28316:             const on = Boolean(toggleValues[key]);
28317:             btn.classList.toggle('mcms-on', on);
28318:             const pill = btn.querySelector('.mcms-pill');
28319:             if (pill) pill.textContent = key === 'coverage' ? (on ? `${state.coverage.radiusMi}mi` : 'OFF') : key === 'heatmap' ? (on ? `${state.heatmap.radiusMi}mi` : 'OFF') : (on ? 'ON' : 'OFF');
28320:         });
28321: 
28322:         const majorIncidentMinimum = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="major-incident-minimum"]');
28323:         if (majorIncidentMinimum) majorIncidentMinimum.value = String(state.majorIncidentFeed.minimumCredits);
28324:         const radius = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="coverage-radius"]');
28325:         if (radius) radius.value = String(state.coverage.radiusMi);
28326:         const heatmapSource = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="heatmap-source"]');
28327:         if (heatmapSource) heatmapSource.value = state.heatmap.source;
28328:         const heatmapService = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="heatmap-service"]');
28329:         if (heatmapService) heatmapService.value = state.heatmap.service;
28330:         const heatmapRadius = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="heatmap-radius"]');
28331:         if (heatmapRadius) heatmapRadius.value = String(state.heatmap.radiusMi);
28332:         const heatmapOpacity = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="heatmap-opacity"]');
28333:         if (heatmapOpacity) heatmapOpacity.value = String(state.heatmap.opacity);
28334:         const allianceCreditMinimum = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="alliance-credit-minimum"]');
28335:         if (allianceCreditMinimum) allianceCreditMinimum.value = String(state.allianceCreditMinimum);
28336:         const transportSweepDelay = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="transport-sweep-delay"]');
28337:         if (transportSweepDelay) transportSweepDelay.value = String(state.transportSweep.delayMs);
28338:         const transportSweepMax = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="transport-sweep-max"]');
28339:         if (transportSweepMax) transportSweepMax.value = String(state.transportSweep.maxPerRun);
28340:         if (panel.classList.contains('mcms-open') && state.activeTab === 'resources') renderTransportSweepPanel();
28341:         const payoutTemplate = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="payout-template"]');
28342:         if (payoutTemplate) payoutTemplate.value = state.payoutFlash.template;
28343:         const resourceGapRadius = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="resource-gap-radius"]'); if (resourceGapRadius) resourceGapRadius.value = String(state.resourceGap.radiusMi);
28344:         const stuckThreshold = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="stuck-threshold"]');
28345:         if (stuckThreshold) stuckThreshold.value = String(state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin);
28346:         const payoutThreshold = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="payout-threshold"]');
28347:         if (payoutThreshold) payoutThreshold.value = String(state.payoutFlash.threshold);
28348:         const payoutDuration = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="payout-duration"]');
28349:         if (payoutDuration) payoutDuration.value = String(state.payoutFlash.durationMs / 1000);
28350:         const payoutVolume = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="payout-volume"]');
28351:         if (payoutVolume) payoutVolume.value = String(state.payoutFlash.soundVolume);
28352:         const discordWebhook = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-webhook"]');
28353:         if (discordWebhook && document.activeElement !== discordWebhook) discordWebhook.value = getDiscordWebhookUrl();
28354:         const discordName = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-name"]');
28355:         if (discordName && document.activeElement !== discordName) discordName.value = state.discordReport.webhookName;
28356:         const discordTopCategories = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-top-categories"]');
28357:         if (discordTopCategories) discordTopCategories.value = String(state.discordReport.topCategories);
28358:         const discordPeriod = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-period"]');
28359:         if (discordPeriod) discordPeriod.value = state.discordReport.period;
28360:         const discordCustomStart = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-custom-start"]');
28361:         if (discordCustomStart && document.activeElement !== discordCustomStart) discordCustomStart.value = state.discordReport.customStart;
28362:         const discordCustomEnd = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-custom-end"]');
28363:         if (discordCustomEnd && document.activeElement !== discordCustomEnd) discordCustomEnd.value = state.discordReport.customEnd;
28364:         const discordComparison = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-comparison"]');
28365:         if (discordComparison) discordComparison.value = String(state.discordReport.includeComparison);
28366:         const discordChart = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-chart"]');
28367:         if (discordChart) discordChart.value = String(state.discordReport.includeChart);
28368:         const discordReportMode = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-report-mode"]');
28369:         if (discordReportMode) discordReportMode.value = state.discordReport.reportMode;
28370:         const discordRisk = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-risk"]');
28371:         if (discordRisk) discordRisk.value = String(state.discordReport.includeRisk);
28372:         const discordForecast = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-forecast"]');
28373:         if (discordForecast) discordForecast.value = String(state.discordReport.includeForecast);
28374:         const financeVaultEnabled = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="finance-vault-enabled"]');
28375:         if (financeVaultEnabled) financeVaultEnabled.value = String(state.financialVault.enabled);
28376:         const financeVaultRetention = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="finance-vault-retention"]');
28377:         if (financeVaultRetention) financeVaultRetention.value = String(state.financialVault.retentionDays);
28378:         const financeRuleFeed = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="finance-rule-feed"]');
28379:         if (financeRuleFeed) financeRuleFeed.value = String(state.financialVault.ruleFeedEnabled);
28380:         setDiscordStatus(discordFinanceStatus, discordFinanceStatusTone);
28381:         if (panel.classList.contains('mcms-open') && state.activeTab === 'discord') renderFinanceVaultStatus();
28382:         const nightStart = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="auto-night-start"]');
28383:         if (nightStart) nightStart.value = state.autoNight.nightStart;
28384:         const dayStart = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="auto-day-start"]');
28385:         if (dayStart) dayStart.value = state.autoNight.dayStart;
28386:         const nightTheme = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="auto-night-theme"]');
28387:         if (nightTheme) nightTheme.value = state.autoNight.nightTheme;
28388:         const dayTheme = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="auto-day-theme"]');
28389:         if (dayTheme) dayTheme.value = state.autoNight.dayTheme;
28390:         const economyStatus = panel.querySelector('.mcms-economy-status');
28391:         if (economyStatus) economyStatus.textContent = state.economyMode
28392:             ? 'Economy Mode is ON: static visual effects, adaptive refresh intervals and off-screen vehicle/building layer culling are active.'
28393:             : 'Economy Mode is OFF. Use the leaf button beside the map-menu opener to reduce CPU, GPU and marker workload.';
28394:         const nudge = panel.querySelector('.mcms-nudge-value');
28395:         if (nudge) nudge.textContent = `X ${state.nudge.x} / Y ${state.nudge.y}`;
28396:         if (panel.classList.contains('mcms-open') && state.activeTab === 'settings') renderProfiles();
28397:         if ((panel.classList.contains('mcms-open') && state.activeTab === 'ops') || operationalUiIsVisible()) renderOperationalPanels();
28398:     }
28399: 
28400:     function ensureUi() {
28401:         const mapEl = getLargestLeafletMap();
28402:         if (settingsPanelActivated && !document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId)) createPanel();
28403:         if (mapEl) {
28404:             createControl(mapEl);
28405:             const map = findLeafletMapInstance(false);
28406:             if (state.economyMode && map) { applyLeafletEconomyPolicy(map); scheduleEconomyLayerSync(0); }
28407:             if (state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled && operationalStartupComplete) scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(0);
28408:             else if (!state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled) removeMajorIncidentFeed();
28409:             const payoutOverlay = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.payoutFlashId);
28410:             if (payoutOverlay?.classList.contains('mcms-payout-active')) positionPayoutFlashOverlay(payoutOverlay, mapEl);
28411:         }
28412:         return Boolean(mapEl && document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId));
28413:     }
28414: 
28415:     function mutationBelongsToToolkit(mutation) {
28416:         const target = mutation.target;
28417:         const toolkitTarget = Boolean(
28418:             target &&
28419:             target.nodeType === 1 &&
28420:             (
28421:                 target.id === SCRIPT.controlId ||
28422:                 target.id === SCRIPT.panelId ||
28423:                 target.id === SCRIPT.toastId ||
28424:                 target.id === SCRIPT.payoutFlashId ||
28425:                 target.id === SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId ||
28426:                 target.id === SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId ||
28427:                 target.id === SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId ||
28428:                 target.id === SCRIPT.missionInspectorId ||
28429:                 target.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.controlId}`) ||

===== LINES 29261-29370 =====
29261:             economyIntervalResolver: () => operationalUiIsVisible() ? 2 * 60 * 1000 : 5 * 60 * 1000
29262:         });
29263:         runtimeRegisterTask('major-incident-feed-integrity', 5000, () => {
29264:             if (!state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled) return;
29265:             recoverMajorIncidentFeed('integrity check');
29266:         }, {
29267:             intervalResolver: () => state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled ? 5000 : 60 * 1000,
29268:             economyIntervalMs: 12000,
29269:             economyIntervalResolver: () => state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled ? 12000 : 2 * 60 * 1000
29270:         });
29271:         runtimeRegisterTask('building-visibility', BUILDING_VISIBILITY_RECHECK_MS, () => {
29272:             if (!state.visibility.buildings) synchronisePersonalBuildingVisibility();
29273:             if (state.economyMode) scheduleEconomyLayerSync(0);
29274:         }, {
29275:             intervalResolver: () => !state.visibility.buildings ? BUILDING_VISIBILITY_RECHECK_MS : 60 * 1000,
29276:             economyIntervalMs: 45 * 1000,
29277:             economyIntervalResolver: () => (!state.visibility.buildings || state.economyMode) ? 45 * 1000 : 2 * 60 * 1000
29278:         });
29279:         runtimeListen(document, 'visibilitychange', () => {
29280:             if (document.hidden) return;
29281:             runtimeWakeTaskScheduler(0);
29282:             ensureUi();
29283:             refreshSuppression();
29284:             if (vehicleDataNeeded()) refreshPersonalVehicleData(false);
29285:             if (state.economyMode) scheduleEconomyLayerSync(0);
29286:             scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: missionSnapshotsNeeded(), positionPanel: true });
29287:             scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(80);
29288:         });
29289:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
29290:             if (document.hidden || !operationalStartupComplete) return;
29291:             scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: false, positionPanel: false, mapOnly: true });
29292:         }, 2200);
29293: 
29294:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => {
29295:             stopAutoLoadAllVehicles();
29296:             transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested = true;
29297:             document.removeEventListener('mousemove', movePanelDrag, true);
29298:             document.removeEventListener('mouseup', endPanelDrag, true);
29299:             document.removeEventListener('touchmove', movePanelDrag, true);
29300:             document.removeEventListener('touchend', endPanelDrag, true);
29301:             document.removeEventListener('touchcancel', endPanelDrag, true);
29302:             document.documentElement.style.cursor = '';
29303:             if (document.body) document.body.style.userSelect = '';
29304:             restoreEconomyLayers();
29305:             restoreLeafletEconomyPolicy();
29306:             disposeEconomyCanvasRenderer();
29307:             runtimeClearTimeout(majorIncidentFeedLayoutTimer);
29308:             majorIncidentFeedLayoutTimer = null;
29309:             const originalBuildingVisibility = state.visibility.buildings;
29310:             try {
29311:                 state.visibility.buildings = true;
29312:                 synchronisePersonalBuildingVisibility(cachedMap);
29313:             } catch (err) {
29314:                 console.debug(`[${SCRIPT.name}] Building visibility restoration skipped during teardown.`, err);
29315:             } finally {
29316:                 state.visibility.buildings = originalBuildingVisibility;
29317:             }
29318:             try { creditsValueObserver?.disconnect(); } catch (err) {}
29319:             removeMajorIncidentFeed();
29320:             clearMissionLockOnEffect();
29321:             clearAllianceCreditLabels();
29322:             clearMissionAgeLabels();
29323:             clearUnitCommitmentLabels();
29324:             clearTransportWatcherLabels();
29325:             clearResourceGapLabels();
29326:             clearStuckMissionLabels();
29327:             clearCoverageHeatmap();
29328:             if (coverageGroup) {
29329:                 try { coverageGroup.clearLayers(); coverageGroup.remove(); } catch (err) {}
29330:                 coverageGroup = null;
29331:             }
29332:             stopPayoutFlashAnimation();
29333:             disposePayoutMediaAudio();
29334:             try { payoutAudioContext?.close?.(); } catch (err) {}
29335:             clearDiscordPreviewChartUrl();
29336:             closeHelpCenter({ restoreFocus: false });
29337:             helpGuideDocumentCache = '';
29338:             helpGuideLoadedAt = 0;
29339:             stopDesktopPanelWorkspaceObservation();
29340:             runtimeUntrackObserver(desktopPanelResizeObserver);
29341:             desktopPanelResizeObserver = null;
29342:             runtimeUntrackObserver(majorIncidentFeedResizeObserver);
29343:             majorIncidentFeedResizeObserver = null;
29344:             majorIncidentFeedObservedElement = null;
29345:             missionSnapshotCache.clear();
29346:             missionPanelCache.clear();
29347:             missionOverlayVersions.clear();
29348:             markerRegistryCache.clear();
29349:             criticalMissionStableCache.clear();
29350:             removeOldInstances();
29351:             const root = document.documentElement;
29352:             for (const attribute of ['data-mcms-ui-theme', 'data-mc-map-skin', 'data-mcms-clean', 'data-mcms-marker-focus', 'data-mcms-mission-pulse', 'data-mcms-road-priority', 'data-mcms-compact-dock', 'data-mcms-command-bar-open', 'data-mcms-economy', 'data-mcms-map-moving', 'data-mcms-alliance-buildings-map', 'data-mcms-alliance-buildings-page', 'data-mcms-device-layout', 'data-mcms-tablet-mode', 'data-mcms-tablet-active', 'data-mcms-tablet-orientation', 'data-mcms-mobile-mode', 'data-mcms-mobile-active', 'data-mcms-mobile-orientation', 'data-mcms-show-alliance-missions', 'data-mcms-show-my-missions', 'data-mcms-show-vehicles', 'data-mcms-show-buildings', 'data-mcms-critical-view', 'data-mcms-help-open']) root.removeAttribute(attribute);
29353:         });
29354: 
29355:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => runAutoNight(true), 180);
29356:         if (state.economyMode) runtimeSetTimeout(() => setEconomyMode(true, false), 420);
29357:         console.debug(`[${SCRIPT.name}] v${SCRIPT.version} audited runtime ready.`);
29358:     }
29359: 
29360:     function scheduleBoot() {
29361:         if (runtime.destroyed || bootStarted) return;
29362:         runtimeRunWhenIdle(boot, STARTUP_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS);
29363:     }
29364: 
29365:     if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
29366:         runtimeListen(document, 'DOMContentLoaded', scheduleBoot, { once: true });
29367:     } else {
29368:         scheduleBoot();
29369:     }
29370: })();
